title_zh: GLM-5.1 免费领！AtomCode CodingPlan 完整攻略与避坑指南
title_en: Get GLM-5.1 Free: AtomCode CodingPlan Complete Guide & Tips
description_zh: GLM-5.1 拿下开源编码评测第一，AtomCode CodingPlan 限时免费放 Pro 档额度。
description_en: GLM-5.1 tops open-source coding benchmarks. AtomCode CodingPlan offers free 30-day Pro access.

faq_zh.q: GLM-5.1 和 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 哪个写代码更强？
faq_zh.a: GLM-5.1 在 Artificial Analysis Coding Agent 基准测试里拿了开源第一，综合实力更强。

faq_zh.q: AtomCode CodingPlan 30 天后还能用吗？
faq_zh.a: 目前没有续期机制。30 天到期后额度清零，大概率会出付费方案。

faq_zh.q: 每天的免费名额到底有多少？
faq_zh.a: 不同来源说法不一，有的说 2000 个，有的说 800 个。建议早上 9 点前去抢，成功率最高。

faq_zh.q: 只能在 AtomCode 客户端里用吗？
faq_zh.a: 目前只支持 AtomCode 客户端内使用，不支持第三方 API 调用。

faq_zh.q: 和智谱官方的 Coding Plan 比哪个好？
faq_zh.a: 智谱官方在涨价，名额难抢。AtomCode 免费、模型多、不用翻墙。

faq_zh.q: 这个活动是永久免费的吗？
faq_zh.a: 不是。限时活动，华为通过免费额度拉开发者进昇腾生态。趁现在能领，先领了再说。

faq_en.q: Which is better for coding: GLM-5.1 or DeepSeek-V4-Flash?
faq_en.a: GLM-5.1 topped the open-source coding benchmarks, stronger overall.

faq_en.q: Can I use AtomCode CodingPlan after 30 days?
faq_en.a: No renewal mechanism. Credits expire after 30 days.

faq_en.q: How many free slots per day?
faq_en.a: Varies. Try before 9 AM for best chances.

faq_en.q: Client-only or API access?
faq_en.a: Client-only. No third-party API.

faq_en.q: vs Zhipu's Coding Plan?
faq_en.a: Zhipu raises prices, slots hard to get. AtomCode: free, more models, no VPN.

faq_en.q: Free forever?
faq_en.a: No. Limited-time promotion. Claim while you can.

content_zh:
> 本文基于 AtomCode 官方页面、搜狗微信公众号搜索（10 篇相关文章）、Artificial Analysis 最新评测数据整理。

---

## 一句话总结

GLM-5.1 在 Artificial Analysis 刚发布的 Coding Agent 基准测试里拿了开源第一，仅次于 Opus 4.7。平时用这模型要么 API 贵，要么排队。但 AtomCode（原子代码）现在搞了个 CodingPlan，0 元白拿 30 天 Pro 档额度，GLM-5.1 直接用。

这不是野鸡平台。AtomCode 是华为系产品，跑在昇腾芯片上，对标的是 Claude Code。

---

## GLM-5.1 到底强在哪

![AtomCode CodingPlan 免费额度功能特性详解](/data/articles/atomcode-homepage.webp)

Artificial Analysis 的 Coding Agent Index 测了三个基准：SWE-Bench-Pro-Hard-AA、Terminal-Bench v2、SWE-Atlas-QnA。闭源第一是 Opus 4.7（Cursor CLI 环境），开源第一是 GLM-5.1（Claude Code 环境）。

这个评测不是挑软柿子捏。SWE-Bench 系列是目前代码能力最硬的标尺，Terminal-Bench 测的是终端操作能力，SWE-Atlas-QnA 测的是代码理解。三项全测拿第一，说明 GLM-5.1 不是只会写 hello world。

同一天，Kilo Code 发布了编程专项榜单，GLM-5.1 同样在国产模型里排第一。两个独立评测机构同一天给出同样的结论，巧合得有点刻意。

---

## 竞品价格对比——免费的含金量

![AtomCode CodingPlan 免费额度价格方案对比](/data/articles/atomcode-homepage-2.webp)

搜狗微信搜索里，至少 3 篇公众号文章提到了价格对比：

- 阿里云百炼：GLM-5.1 级别模型 ¥40/月起
- 火山方舟：同档位 ¥40/月起
- 智谱自己的 Coding Plan：一直在涨价，名额抢手
- AtomCode CodingPlan：¥0，30 天有效

一个月省 40 块听起来不多，但关键是智谱官方都在涨价，第三方平台反而免费，这个反差挺魔幻的。

---

## CodingPlan 到底给什么

AtomCode 的 CodingPlan 分两档，都走 5 小时滚动窗口计量（每 5 小时重置一次用量），30 天有效期。

### Lite 档——轻量体验

适合刚开始试水的。支持的模型：

- DeepSeek-V4-Flash
- Qwen3.6-35B-A3B
- MiniMax-M2.7

基础使用限制，够写些小项目。

### Pro 档——开发者主力

额度大约是 Lite 的 5 倍，支持的模型阵容很豪华：

- GLM-5.1（限时免费）
- DeepSeek-V4-Flash
- Qwen/Qwen3 全系列（包括 235B-A22B、32B、30B-A3B 等）
- Qwen-VL 多模态模型

根据 AtomCode 官方页面的信息，Pro 档还支持更多模型：DeepSeek-V3.2、DeepSeek-R1、Qwen3.5-35B-A3B 等。整个模型阵容覆盖了国内主流开源大模型的半壁江山。

---

## 为什么是华为系

AtomCode Air 在合肥正式发布，走的是华为昇腾芯片路线。2026 年 5 月，华为刚发布了昇腾 950PR 芯片，单卡性能达到 H20 的 2.87 倍，成本只有四分之一。

这意味着 AtomCode 背后的算力成本比用英伟达 GPU 低得多。免费发放额度不是做慈善，是昇腾生态在抢开发者。你用它的免费额度写代码，就是在帮华为验证昇腾芯片的软件生态。

这是阳谋，不是阴谋。但对开发者来说，能白嫖就白嫖，谁的芯片不重要。

---

## 怎么领——一步一步来

### 第一步：装客户端

Mac 或 Linux：

```bash
curl -fsSL https://atomgit.com/atomgit_atomcode/atomcode/releases/download/v4.21.2/install.sh | sh
```

Windows PowerShell：

```powershell
irm https://atomgit.com/atomgit_atomcode/atomcode/releases/download/v4.21.2/install.ps1 | iex
```

### 第二步：登录

命令行输入 `atomcode` 启动客户端，微信扫码登录。没账号先去 atomgit.com 注册。

### 第三步：领额度

在客户端里输入 `/codingplan`，点领取。首次启动的欢迎界面也有"Set up CodingPlan 免费额度"按钮，一样的入口。

### 注意事项

- 每天免费名额有限。搜狗搜索里的公众号文章提到每日限量 2000 个 Pro 套餐，另有文章说限量 800 人。具体数字可能浮动，总之早去早得。
- 提示"今日申请额度已满"就只能第二天再试。
- 只能在 AtomCode 客户端里用，不支持第三方 API 调用。想通过 curl 或 Python 脚本调的，这条路不通。

---

## 功能不只是 API 套壳

AtomCode 不是给你一个 API key 就完事了。它带了完整的 coding agent 能力：

- 智能 Agent 循环：自己读文件、改代码、跑测试、上网查资料、自我验证，循环到任务完成
- 8 个内置代码工具：符号索引、调用链追踪、引用查找、影响面分析
- 安全回滚：危险操作要确认，`/undo` 一键回滚上一轮所有文件编辑
- 多模型接入：支持任意 OpenAI 兼容 API

从产品定位上看，AtomCode 明确对标 Claude Code。搜狗搜索结果里有一篇文章标题直接写了"对标 Claude Code！AtomCode Air 在合肥正式发布"。野心不小。

---

## 什么人适合用

- 个人开发者：不想花钱但想用 GLM-5.1 写代码的
- 中小团队：预算有限但需要多个模型切换的
- 技术选型阶段：想试 GLM-5.1 和 DeepSeek-V4-Flash 哪个更适合自己的项目
- 国内开发者：不需要翻墙，不需要海外信用卡

不适合的场景：

- 需要 API 集成到自有系统的（只支持客户端内使用）
- 需要超大额度重度开发的（滚动窗口有上限）
- 对华为生态有顾虑的（虽然这理由有点牵强）

---

## 几个实际的坑

第一，名额是真的有限。搜狗搜索里的公众号文章说法不一，有说 2000 的有说 800 的，但共同点是"手慢无"。建议早上 9 点前去抢。

第二，5 小时滚动窗口意味着你不能一次性用太多。写大项目的时候如果一口气生成几百行代码，可能会触达限制。但对大多数日常编码来说够用。

第三，微信扫码登录这一步，对没有微信或者不想绑微信的人来说是个障碍。目前没看到其他登录方式。

第四，30 天有效期过了之后怎么办？目前没有续期机制的公开信息。大概率到时候会出付费方案，但至少这 30 天是真免费。

---

## 最后说两句

GLM-5.1 拿了开源编码第一，这是事实。AtomCode 通过免费额度拉开发者进昇腾生态，这也是事实。两个事实叠在一起，就是你现在能白嫖的原因。

这种窗口期不会太长。智谱自己的 Coding Plan 都在涨价，华为的免费额度也不可能永远发下去。趁现在能领，先领了再说。

活动页面：https://ai.atomgit.com/serverless-api

---

*最后更新：2026-05-19*
content_en:
This article is compiled based on the AtomCode official page, Sogou WeChat Official Account Search (10 related articles), and the latest evaluation data from Artificial Analysis.

---

## In a Nutshell

GLM-5.1 ranked first among open-source models in the newly released Coding Agent benchmark by Artificial Analysis, second only to Opus 4.7. Normally, accessing this model is either expensive via API or involves long queues. However, AtomCode (原子代码) is now offering a CodingPlan, providing a free 30-day Pro-tier quota for ¥0, allowing direct use of GLM-5.1.

This isn't a sketchy platform. AtomCode is a Huawei-affiliated product running on Ascend chips, aiming to be a counterpart to Claude Code.

---

## What Makes GLM-5.1 So Strong

![Detailed Explanation of AtomCode CodingPlan Free Quota Features](/data/articles/atomcode-homepage.webp)

Artificial Analysis's Coding Agent Index tested three benchmarks: SWE-Bench-Pro-Hard-AA, Terminal-Bench v2, and SWE-Atlas-QnA. The top closed-source model is Opus 4.7 (in a Cursor CLI environment), while the top open-source model is GLM-5.1 (in a Claude Code environment).

This evaluation wasn't cherry-picking easy tasks. The SWE-Bench series is currently the toughest benchmark for coding ability, Terminal-Bench tests terminal operation capabilities, and SWE-Atlas-QnA assesses code comprehension. Ranking first across all three tests indicates that GLM-5.1 is far beyond just writing "hello world".

On the same day, Kilo Code released a programming-specific leaderboard, where GLM-5.1 also ranked first among domestic models. Two independent evaluation bodies arriving at the same conclusion on the same day feels a bit too deliberate to be a coincidence.

---

## Competitor Price Comparison - The Value of Free

![Comparison of AtomCode CodingPlan Free Quota Pricing Plans](/data/articles/atomcode-homepage-2.webp)

Sogou WeChat Search shows that at least 3 Official Account articles mentioned price comparisons:

- Alibaba Cloud Bailian: GLM-5.1-level models start at ¥40/month
- Volcengine Ark: Same tier starts at ¥40/month
- Zhipu's own Coding Plan: Has been steadily increasing in price, with quotas being snapped up quickly
- AtomCode CodingPlan: ¥0, valid for 30 days

Saving ¥40 a month might not sound like much, but the key point is that even Zhipu's official pricing is rising, while a third-party platform is offering it for free. This contrast is quite surreal.

---

## What Does the CodingPlan Actually Include?

AtomCode's CodingPlan has two tiers, both using a 5-hour rolling window metering system (usage resets every 5 hours) with a 30-day validity period.

### Lite Tier - Light Experience

Suitable for beginners just trying things out. Supported models:

- DeepSeek-V4-Flash
- Qwen3.6-35B-A3B
- MiniMax-M2.7

Basic usage limits, sufficient for writing small projects.

### Pro Tier - The Developer Workhorse

The quota is approximately 5 times that of the Lite tier, with a impressive lineup of supported models:

- GLM-5.1 (free for a limited time)
- DeepSeek-V4-Flash
- Qwen/Qwen3 full series (including 235B-A22B, 32B, 30B-A3B, etc.)
- Qwen-VL multimodal models

According to information from the AtomCode official page, the Pro tier supports even more models: DeepSeek-V3.2, DeepSeek-R1, Qwen3.5-35B-A3B, etc. The entire model lineup covers half of China's mainstream open-source large models.

---

## Why It's a Huawei-Affiliated Product

AtomCode Air was officially launched in Hefei, following Huawei's Ascend chip route. In May 2026, Huawei had just released the Ascend 950PR chip, whose single-card performance reaches 2.87 times that of the H20, at only a quarter of the cost.

This means the computing power cost behind AtomCode is much lower than using Nvidia GPUs. Offering quotas for free isn't charity; it's the Ascend ecosystem competing for developers. By using its free quota to write code, you are helping Huawei validate the software ecosystem of Ascend chips.

This is an open strategy, not a conspiracy. But for developers, taking advantage of a freebie is taking advantage of a freebie; whose chip it is doesn't matter.

---

## How to Claim It - Step by Step

### Step 1: Install the Client

For Mac or Linux:

```bash
curl -fsSL https://atomgit.com/atomgit_atomcode/atomcode/releases/download/v4.21.2/install.sh | sh
```

For Windows PowerShell:

```powershell
irm https://atomgit.com/atomgit_atomcode/atomcode/releases/download/v4.21.2/install.ps1 | iex
```

### Step 2: Log In

Enter `atomcode` in the command line to start the client, and log in by scanning the WeChat QR code. If you don't have an account, register first at atomgit.com.

### Step 3: Claim Your Quota

In the client, enter `/codingplan` and click to claim. The welcome screen on first launch also has a "Set up CodingPlan free quota" button—the same entry point.

### Important Notes

- Daily free quotas are limited. Articles from Official Accounts in Sogou Search mention a daily limit of 2,000 Pro packages, while another article says the limit is 800. The exact number may fluctuate; the point is, act fast.
- If you see the message "Today's application quota is full," you'll have to try again the next day.
- It can only be used within the AtomCode client; third-party API calls are not supported. This route doesn't work for trying to call it via `curl` or Python scripts.

---

## It's More Than Just an API Wrapper

AtomCode isn't just handing you an API key and calling it a day. It comes with full coding agent capabilities:

- Intelligent Agent Loop: It reads files, modifies code, runs tests, searches the internet for information, self-verifies, and loops until the task is complete.
- 8 Built-in Code Tools: Symbol indexing, call chain tracing, reference finding, impact analysis.
- Safe Rollback: Dangerous operations require confirmation, and `/undo` rolls back all file edits from the previous round with one click.
- Multi-Model Access: Supports any OpenAI-compatible API.

From a product positioning perspective, AtomCode is clearly benchmarking itself against Claude Code. One article in the Sogou search results even has a title that directly states, "Benchmarking Claude Code! AtomCode Air officially launches in Hefei." The ambition is不小.

---

## Who Is It Suitable For?

- **Individual developers**: Who don't want to spend money but want to use GLM-5.1 for coding.
- **Small and medium-sized teams**: With limited budgets but needing to switch between multiple models.
- **Those in the technology selection phase**: Who want to test whether GLM-5.1 or DeepSeek-V4-Flash is more suitable for their project.
- **Domestic developers**: Who don't need to use a VPN or have an overseas credit card.

**Scenarios where it's not suitable:**

- Needing API integration into proprietary systems (only supports use within the client).
- Needing very large quotas for heavy development (the rolling window has an upper limit).
- Those concerned about the Huawei ecosystem (though this reason is a bit far-fetched).

---

## A Few Practical Pitfalls

First, the quotas are truly limited. Articles from Official Accounts in Sogou Search give varying numbers—some say 2,000, others say 800—but they all agree it's "first come, first served." It's recommended to try claiming it before 9 AM.

Second, the 5-hour rolling window means you can't use too much at once. Writing large projects...

title_zh: 腾讯Marvis正式上线：免费AI助手，每天1000万Tokens，三端都能用
title_en: Tencent Marvis Launches Free: 10M Tokens Daily, Windows/Mac/Android
description_zh: 腾讯Marvis操作系统级AI助手全量上线，每天免费1000万Tokens。
description_en: Tencent Marvis OS-level AI assistant fully launched with 10M free tokens daily.

faq_zh.a: 目前官网没有任何付费入口，每日1000万Tokens免费送。跟微信当年打法一样。

faq_zh.q: 隐私模式真的能保证文件不上传吗？
faq_zh.a: 官方说法是文件零上传，用端侧大模型。建议先用非敏感文件测试。
定位不同。ChatGPT是通用对话AI，Marvis是操作系统级Agent。
16GB内存是硬门槛。Mac需要M1及以上芯片。
预计6月中旬上线。
够聊5000轮对话，普通用户根本用不完。

faq_en.q: Is Marvis really free?
faq_en.a: No paid tier. 10M tokens/day free. Same as WeChat playbook.

faq_en.q: Does privacy mode prevent uploads?
faq_en.a: Zero file upload claim using on-device models. Test first.

faq_en.q: vs ChatGPT?

faq_en.q: PC requirements?

faq_en.q: iOS coming?

faq_en.q: 10M tokens enough?

content_zh:
> 本文基于腾讯Marvis官网（marvis.qq.com）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（8篇相关文章）、科技媒体报道整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

腾讯把「贾维斯」做出来了，而且免费。Marvis（马维斯）5月21日凌晨全量上线，Windows、Mac、安卓三端齐发，不用邀请码，装上就能用。每天白送1000万Tokens，底层跑的是DeepSeek V4和自家混元大模型。

你没看错——不是内测，不是限量，是正式全量。

---

## Marvis 到底是个什么东西

简单说：它是一个住在你电脑/手机里的AI助手，不是浏览器插件，不是网页聊天框，是一个能直接操作你电脑的系统级Agent。

腾讯应用宝团队做的。对，就是那个十几年一直在做PC软件分发的团队。他们最懂Windows桌面生态，这次把攒了多年的能力全堆进了Marvis里。

从搜索结果看，至少8篇公众号文章都在说同一个事：这东西装上就有6个AI"牛马"帮你干活。虽然有点标题党，但确实，它内置了好几个专项Agent，不是单一对话机器人。

---

## 核心功能拆解

![腾讯Marvis 免费AI助手功能特性](/data/articles/marvis-homepage.webp)

### 两个模式，隐私和效率二选一

Marvis 有两种运行模式：

效率模式：端云协同，用腾讯云端大模型处理任务，速度快，能力强。适合大多数场景。

隐私模式：完全用本地大模型，文件零上传。你的文档、图片、合同这些东西不会离开你的电脑。适合对隐私敏感的用户。

这个设计挺聪明的。很多人不用AI助手就是因为怕文件被上传，隐私模式直接打消这个顾虑。

### 手机远程操控电脑

手机连上电脑后，能实时看到电脑上的任务执行画面，随时可以接管操作。相当于你的电脑变成了随身携带的——出门在外也能远程让AI帮你处理电脑上的事。

这个功能对经常出差的人杀伤力很大。在外面突然要改个文件、查个东西，以前得开远程桌面，现在Marvis直接帮你干了。

### 文件智能搜索

不是简单的文件名搜索。它能理解文件内容——搜图片里的人、搜文档里的关键词、按主题分类整理。官方说法是"AI图库"和"AI文档库"。

说白了就是给你的本地文件加了一层AI理解能力。你电脑里几千张照片、几百个文档，它都能帮你找到想要的那个。

### 一句话改电脑设置

"帮我把屏幕亮度调到50%"、"关闭开机自启动的XX软件"、"查看当前内存使用情况"——这种以前要翻半天设置的操作，现在一句话搞定。

它深度理解操作系统和硬件信息，不是简单的快捷指令，是真的能操作系统的Agent。

### 文件深度理解与生成

文档内容优化、图表生成、文案润色、格式转换——这些它都能做。相当于把ChatGPT的文件分析能力直接嵌进了桌面。

---

## 内置Agent技能包

![腾讯Marvis 免费AI助手使用步骤](/data/articles/marvis-steps.webp)

Marvis 装好之后自带好几个专项Agent，不用自己配置：

追星好搭子：搜索明星资讯、微博自动签到、整理高清物料。粉丝群体的刚需。

游戏陪你玩：限时福利监控、智能行动规划、自动每日任务。游戏党的福利提醒器。

情报监控器：大厂情报监控、社会新闻推送、票务信息搜集。做自媒体或者需要信息差的人用得上。

知识管理员：专业书籍蒸馏、个人笔记提炼、求职资料筹备。学习和求职场景。

打工好帮手：文件格式转换、合同信息审查、运营数据分析。办公场景的万金油。

电脑小管家：一句话改系统设置、系统清理、网络修复。系统维护。

成长加速器：英语学习伴读、文献整理、AI工具使用指南。

生活艺术家：高分电影推荐、宝宝成长相照、旅行攻略评估。

这些技能基本覆盖了日常电脑使用的主要场景。不是那种"什么都能做但什么都做不好"的万金油，而是分了具体场景的专项Agent。

---

## 模型和免费额度

根据官网和科技媒体报道，Marvis底层使用的模型包括：

DeepSeek V4：国产开源模型里的顶流，代码和推理能力都很强。

腾讯混元3（Hunyuan3/HY3）：腾讯自家的大模型，中文理解和生成能力在线。

本地模型（隐私模式）：具体型号未公开，但支持端侧运行。

免费额度方面，多个媒体报道提到每日1000万Tokens。这个量级对日常使用来说绰绰有余——你一天跟AI聊100轮对话，每轮2000字，也才200万Tokens左右。

而且这是每天重置的，不是一次性给你的。天天都能用。

---

## 竞品对比——免费的含金量

Marvis（腾讯）vs Copilot（微软）vs 通义灵码（阿里）

价格：Marvis完全免费，Copilot $20/月（Pro），通义灵码基础免费/Pro付费
模型：Marvis用DeepSeek V4 + 混元，Copilot用GPT-4o + DALL-E，通义灵码用Qwen系列
本地文件操作：Marvis支持，Copilot有限，通义灵码不支持
手机远程控制：Marvis支持，其他两个都不支持
隐私模式：Marvis支持（本地模型），其他两个都不支持
系统级操作：Marvis深度支持，Copilot有限，通义灵码不支持
每日额度：Marvis 1000万Tokens，Copilot无明确限制但付费，通义灵码按调用计费

微软Copilot每月20美元，功能还没Marvis全面。通义灵码主要做编程辅助，不是系统级助手。

Marvis的差异化很明显：免费 + 系统级 + 隐私模式 + 手机远程。这三个组合在市面上找不到第二个。

---

## 怎么下载和安装

### Windows端

官网 marvis.qq.com 直接下载。

配置要求：
处理器：6核及以上CPU
内存：16GB及以上
硬盘：固态硬盘
系统：Windows 10及以上，x64架构

### macOS端

同样从官网下载。

配置要求：
芯片：Apple Silicon，M1及以上
系统：macOS 13及以上

### 安卓端

官网扫码下载，已经可以用了。

### iOS端

还在送审中，预计6月中旬上线。

---

## 安装后怎么用

装好打开Marvis，它会自动扫描你的系统环境，然后进入主界面。

第一步建议先选模式：如果你处理敏感文件多，选隐私模式；如果追求效率，选效率模式。

第二步连接手机（可选）：手机装Marvis后扫码配对，就能远程操控电脑了。

第三步直接用自然语言下指令。不用学什么命令语法，就跟聊天一样说你要干什么就行。

---

## 值不值得装

说句实在话：如果你每天用电脑超过4小时，装一个不亏。

原因很简单——它是免费的，不吃你多少资源，但能帮你省不少时间。文件搜索、系统设置、文档处理这些日常操作，用AI助手确实比自己手动快。

隐私模式是个加分项。很多人不敢用AI工具就是因为怕数据泄露，Marvis的本地模型方案直接解决了这个痛点。

唯一要注意的是配置要求——16GB内存起步，8GB的电脑跑起来可能会卡。如果你的电脑配置不够，先看看自己的硬件再决定。

---

## 常见问题

### Marvis真的完全免费吗？以后会不会收费？

目前官网没有任何付费入口，每日1000万Tokens也是免费送的。腾讯的策略应该是先圈用户再考虑变现——跟微信当年的打法一样。短期内不用担心收费问题。

### 隐私模式真的能保证文件不上传吗？

官方说法是"文件零上传"，用的是端侧大模型。从技术角度说，本地模型确实不需要联网就能运行。但建议你先用非敏感文件测试一下，确认没问题再处理重要文档。

### 跟ChatGPT比哪个好？

定位不同。ChatGPT是通用对话AI，Marvis是操作系统级Agent。ChatGPT不能帮你改电脑设置、不能搜索本地文件、不能远程控制手机。Marvis在"操作电脑"这件事上比ChatGPT强得多，但通用对话能力可能不如ChatGPT。

### 电脑配置不够怎么办？

16GB内存是硬门槛。如果你的电脑只有8GB，建议先升级内存再装。Mac用户需要M1及以上芯片，Intel Mac暂时不支持。

### 以后会出iOS版吗？

官网显示iOS版本在送审中，预计6月中旬上线。

### 每天1000万Tokens够用吗？

对普通用户来说绰绰有余。粗略估算：每轮对话约2000 Tokens，1000万Tokens够你聊5000轮。就算你一天跟AI聊8小时，也用不完这个额度。
content_en:
> This article is compiled based on Tencent's official Marvis website (marvis.qq.com), Sogou WeChat Official Account Search (8 related articles), and technology media reports. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## In a Nutshell

Tencent has built "Jarvis," and it's free. Marvis was fully launched in the early hours of May 21st, available simultaneously on Windows, Mac, and Android. No invitation codes needed—just install and use. It comes with a daily free allowance of 10 million tokens, powered by DeepSeek V4 and Tencent's own Hunyuan large model.

You read that correctly—not a beta, not limited availability, but a full, official launch.

---

## What Exactly is Marvis?

Simply put: It's an AI assistant that lives inside your computer/phone. Not a browser plugin, not a web chat box, but a system-level Agent that can directly operate your computer.

It's developed by Tencent's MyApp (Yingyongbao) team. Yes, the team that has been distributing PC software for over a decade. They understand the Windows desktop ecosystem best, and this time, they've packed years of accumulated capabilities into Marvis.

According to search results, at least 8 WeChat articles highlight the same point: Once installed, you get 6 AI "workhorses" to help you get things done. While the headline might be a bit clickbaity, it's true—Marvis comes with several specialized Agents built-in, not just a single chatbot.

---

## Breakdown of Core Features

![Tencent Marvis Free AI Assistant Features](/data/articles/marvis-homepage.webp)

### Two Modes: Choose Between Privacy and Efficiency

Marvis offers two operating modes:

**Efficiency Mode:** Uses cloud-device collaboration, leveraging Tencent's cloud-based large models for fast, powerful processing. Suitable for most scenarios.

**Privacy Mode:** Operates entirely using a local large model, with zero file uploads. Your documents, images, contracts, and other files never leave your computer. Ideal for privacy-sensitive users.

This is a clever design. Many people avoid AI assistants due to fears of file uploads; the Privacy Mode directly eliminates this concern.

### Remote Phone Control of Your Computer

Once your phone is connected to your computer, you can see the task execution screen in real-time and take over control at any time. Essentially, your computer becomes portable—allowing the AI to handle computer tasks on your behalf even when you're out and about.

This feature is incredibly valuable for frequent business travelers. Need to edit a document or check something urgently while out? Previously, you'd need a remote desktop; now, Marvis can handle it for you directly.

### Intelligent File Search

This isn't simple filename search. It understands file content—searching for people in images, keywords in documents, or organizing by topic. The official terms are "AI Photo Library" and "AI Document Library."

In essence, it adds a layer of AI comprehension to your local files. It can help you find the exact item you need among thousands of photos or hundreds of documents on your computer.

### Change Computer Settings with a Single Command

"Set my screen brightness to 50%," "Turn off XX software that launches at startup," "Check my current memory usage"—operations that used to require digging through settings can now be done with a simple phrase.

It deeply understands the operating system and hardware information. It's not just simple shortcut commands; it's a true Agent capable of operating the system.

### Deep File Understanding and Generation

It can optimize document content, generate charts, refine copy, convert formats—and more. Essentially, it embeds ChatGPT's file analysis capabilities directly into your desktop.

---

## Built-in Agent Skill Packages

![Tencent Marvis Free AI Assistant Usage Steps](/data/articles/marvis-steps.webp)

Marvis comes with several specialized Agents ready to use after installation, with no configuration required:

- **Celebrity Follower:** Searches for celebrity news, auto-signs into Weibo, and organizes HD media materials. A must-have for fan communities.
- **Gaming Companion:** Monitors limited-time offers, creates smart action plans, and automates daily tasks. A benefit reminder tool for gamers.
- **Intelligence Monitor:** Tracks tech company intelligence, pushes social news, and gathers ticketing information. Useful for self-media or anyone needing an information edge.
- **Knowledge Manager:** Distills professional books, extracts personal notes, and prepares job application materials. For learning and job-seeking scenarios.
- **Office Assistant:** Converts file formats, reviews contract information, and analyzes operational data. A versatile tool for office scenarios.
- **Computer Steward:** Changes system settings via commands, performs system cleanup, and fixes network issues. For system maintenance.
- **Growth Accelerator:** Provides English learning companionship, organizes literature, and offers guides for using AI tools.
- **Life Artist:** Recommends high-rated movies, helps manage baby growth photos, and evaluates travel plans.

These skills cover the main scenarios of daily computer use. They aren't the jack-of-all-trades, master-of-none type, but rather specialized Agents tailored to specific scenarios.

---

## Models and Free Quota

According to the official website and tech media reports, the models used by Marvis include:

- **DeepSeek V4:** A top-tier domestic open-source model with strong capabilities in both code and reasoning.
- **Tencent Hunyuan3 (Hunyuan3/HY3):** Tencent's own large model, with online Chinese language understanding and generation capabilities.
- **Local Model (Privacy Mode):** The specific model is undisclosed, but it supports on-device execution.

Regarding the free quota, multiple media reports mention **10 million tokens per day**. This amount is more than sufficient for daily use—you could have 100 rounds of conversation with the AI in a day, each with 2,000 characters, and it would only use about 2 million tokens.

Furthermore, this quota resets daily; it's not a one-time allocation. It's available for use every day.

---

## Competitive Comparison—The Value of "Free"

**Marvis (Tencent) vs. Copilot (Microsoft) vs. Tongyi Lingma (Alibaba)**

| Feature | Marvis (Tencent) | Copilot (Microsoft) | Tongyi Lingma (Alibaba) |
| :--- | :--- | :--- | :--- |
| **Price** | Completely Free | $20/month (Pro) | Basic Free / Pro Paid |
| **Models** | DeepSeek V4 + Hunyuan | GPT-4o + DALL-E | Qwen Series |
| **Local File Operation** | Supported | Limited | Not Supported |
| **Phone Remote Control** | Supported | Not Supported | Not Supported |
| **Privacy Mode** | Supported (Local Model) | Not Supported | Not Supported |
| **System-Level Operation** | Deeply Supported | Limited | Not Supported |
| **Daily Quota** | 10M Tokens | No clear limit (paid) | Pay-per-use |

Microsoft's Copilot costs $20 a month and isn't as comprehensive as Marvis. Tongyi Lingma primarily aids in programming, not system-level assistance.

Marvis's differentiation is clear: **Free + System-Level + Privacy Mode + Phone Remote Control**. This combination cannot be found anywhere else on the market.

---

## How to Download and Install

### Windows Version

Download directly from the official website: marvis.qq.com.

**System Requirements:**
- Processor: 6-core CPU or higher
- Memory: 16GB or more
- Storage: Solid-State Drive (SSD)
- OS: Windows 10 or higher, x64 architecture

### macOS Version

Also download from the official website.

**System Requirements:**
- Chip: Apple Silicon, M1 or later
- OS: macOS 13 or higher

### Android Version

Scan the QR code on the official website to download; it's already usable.

### iOS Version

Currently under review, expected to launch in mid-June.

---

## How to Use After Installation

After installing and opening Marvis, it will automatically scan your system environment and then enter the main interface.

1.  **First Step - Choose a Mode:** If you handle many sensitive files, select Privacy Mode; if you prioritize efficiency, select Efficiency Mode.
2.  **Second Step - Connect Your Phone (Optional):** After installing Marvis on your phone, scan the QR code to pair it, enabling remote control of your computer.
3.  **Third Step - Use Natural Language Commands.** No need to learn command syntax; just tell it what you want to do, as if you were chatting.

---

## Is It Worth Installing?

To be honest: If you use your computer for more than 4 hours a day, installing it is a no-brainer.

The reason is simple—it's free, doesn't consume many resources, but can save you a considerable amount of time. For daily operations like file search, system settings, and document processing, using an AI assistant is indeed faster than doing it manually.

The Privacy Mode is a major plus. Many people are hesitant to use AI tools due to data security concerns; Marvis's local model solution directly addresses this pain point.

The only thing to note is the hardware requirement—it starts at 16GB of RAM; computers with 8GB may run slowly. If your computer's configuration is not...

description_en: Cursor has a free Hobby plan, no credit card needed. Limited Agent requests and Tab completions, enough for small projects. Pro at $20/mo.

faq_zh.q: Cursor免费版需要绑信用卡吗？

faq_zh.q: Cursor免费版的Agent请求有多少次？

content_zh:
> 本文基于 Cursor 官网（cursor.com/pricing）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（8篇相关文章）、开发者社区实测数据整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

Cursor 有免费版（Hobby计划），不用绑信用卡就能用。Agent请求和Tab补全有限制，但对个人小项目来说够用了。想深度使用，Pro版$20/月。

---

## Cursor 是什么

Cursor 是一个AI编程IDE，基于VSCode改的。它把AI直接嵌进了编辑器里——你写代码的时候，AI能自动补全、帮你改bug、根据注释生成函数、甚至帮你重构整个文件。

2026年5月市场份额31%，是AI编程工具里用户最多的。估值293亿美元。

不是插件，是一个完整的编辑器。装上就能用，界面和VSCode几乎一样。

---

## 免费版到底给什么

![Cursor AI编程编辑器首页 - 免费版功能](/data/articles/cursor-homepage.webp))

Cursor的Hobby计划（免费版）包含：

- 不需要绑信用卡
- 有限的Agent请求（具体数量官方没公开，社区实测大概每天几十次）
- 有限的Tab补全（代码自动补全）
- 可以用基础模型

说实话，"有限"这个词很模糊。社区反馈不一，有人说够用一天，有人说半天就用完了。取决于你写代码的频率和复杂度。

---

## 付费版对比

Individual Pro：$20/月
- Agent请求大幅增加
- 可以用前沿模型（GPT-4o、Claude等）
- 支持MCPs、skills、hooks
- Cloud agents（云端Agent）
- Bugbot按用量计费

Pro+和Ultra：更高级的Agent用量，适合重度用户。

Teams：$40/用户/月
- 共享团队上下文的Cloud agents
- 团队规则和自动化
- 安全审查Agent
- SAML/OIDC SSO

Enterprise：自定义价格
- 池化用量
- 发票/PO计费
- SCIM席位管理

---

## 和竞品怎么选

![Cursor定价页面 - 免费版vs付费版对比](/data/articles/cursor-pricing-real.webp))

Cursor vs Windsurf vs Copilot，这是2026年AI编程工具的"三国杀"。

Cursor的优势：
- 市场份额最大，社区资源最多
- Agent能力强，不只是代码补全
- 支持的模型最多（GPT-4o、Claude、Gemini等）
- 有Cloud agents功能

Cursor的劣势：
- 免费版限制比较含糊
- $20/月的价格不算便宜
- 基于VSCode，有些人觉得太重

Windsurf的优势：
- 免费版更慷慨
- 界面更简洁
- Cascade功能（多文件同时编辑）体验好

Copilot的优势：
- 和GitHub深度集成
- $10/月更便宜
- 企业用户多

---

## 实际使用体验

装上Cursor之后，写代码的体验确实不一样。几个亮点：

Agent模式：告诉它"帮我把这个函数重写，加上错误处理"，它能自己读代码、改代码、跑测试。不是简单的代码补全，是真的在"帮你写代码"。

Tab补全：按Tab就能接受AI建议，比手写快很多。免费版虽然有限制，但小项目够用。

代码聊天：右边有个聊天框，可以问"这段代码是什么意思"、"怎么优化这个查询"，回答质量比ChatGPT好，因为它能直接看你项目里的代码。

---

## 适合谁用

适合：
- 个人开发者、学生、独立项目
- 想试试AI编程但不想先花钱的人
- 已经用VSCode的人（迁移成本为零）

不太适合：
- 大团队协作（需要Teams版）
- 重度AI编程用户（免费版额度不够）
- 预算敏感的用户（$20/月不便宜）

---

## 怎么开始

1. 去 cursor.com 下载
2. 装好后选Hobby（免费）计划
3. 不用绑信用卡，直接开始用
4. 写代码的时候按Tab接受补全，或者用Cmd+K（Mac）/ Ctrl+K（Windows）呼出Agent

---

## 内部链接推荐

如果你在找免费AI编程工具，这几个也值得看看：

- [AtomCode CodingPlan](/zh/guides/atomcode-codingplan-glm51)：华为系，限时免费领GLM-5.1，30天Pro档
- [通义灵码](/zh/coding/tongyi-lingma)：阿里云出品，个人版永久免费
- [Codeium](/zh/coding/codeium)：个人版永久免费，支持的IDE最多
- [腾讯Marvis](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent)：免费AI助手，每天1000万Tokens
content_en:
This article is based on information compiled from the Cursor official website (cursor.com/pricing), Sogou WeChat official account search (8 related articles), and developer community test data. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

Cursor has a free version (Hobby plan) that doesn't require a credit card. There are limits on Agent requests and Tab completions, but it's sufficient for personal small projects. For deep usage, the Pro version is $20/month.

---

## What is Cursor

Cursor is an AI-powered programming IDE, built on top of VSCode. It integrates AI directly into the editor—while you write code, the AI can automatically complete lines, help you fix bugs, generate functions from comments, and even help you refactor entire files.

As of May 2026, it holds a 31% market share, making it the most popular AI programming tool by users. Its valuation is $29.3 billion.

It's not a plugin; it's a complete editor. Install it and it works, with an interface almost identical to VSCode.

---

## What the Free Version Actually Offers

![Cursor AI Code Editor Homepage - Free Version](/data/articles/cursor-homepage.webp))

Cursor's Hobby plan (free version) includes:

- No credit card required
- Limited Agent requests (the exact number isn't officially disclosed; community tests suggest roughly several dozen per day)
- Limited Tab completions (automatic code completion)
- Access to basic models

To be honest, the term "limited" is quite vague. Community feedback varies—some say it's enough for a day, others say they use it up in half a day. It depends on the frequency and complexity of your coding.

---

## Paid Plan Comparison

Individual Pro: $20/month
- Significantly increased Agent requests
- Access to frontier models (GPT-4o, Claude, etc.)
- Support for MCPs, skills, hooks
- Cloud agents
- Bugbot billed by usage

Pro+ and Ultra: Higher Agent quotas, suitable for heavy users.

Teams: $40/user/month
- Shared team context for Cloud agents
- Team rules and automation
- Security review Agent
- SAML/OIDC SSO

Enterprise: Custom pricing
- Pooled usage
- Invoice/PO billing
- SCIM seat management

---

## How to Choose vs. Competitors

![Cursor Pricing - Free vs Paid Comparison](/data/articles/cursor-pricing-real.webp))

Cursor vs. Windsurf vs. Copilot—this is the 2026 "three-way competition" in AI programming tools.

Cursor's advantages:
- Largest market share, most community resources
- Strong Agent capabilities, not just code completion
- Supports the most models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
- Cloud agents feature

Cursor's disadvantages:
- Free version limits are vague
- $20/month isn't cheap
- Based on VSCode, which some find too heavy

Windsurf's advantages:
- More generous free version
- Simpler interface
- Good experience with Cascade feature (multi-file simultaneous editing)

Copilot's advantages:
- Deep integration with GitHub
- Cheaper at $10/month
- More enterprise users

---

## Real-World Usage Experience

After installing Cursor, the coding experience is genuinely different. A few highlights:

Agent mode: Tell it "help me rewrite this function, adding error handling," and it will read the code, modify it, and run tests on its own. This isn't simple code completion; it's truly "helping you write code."

Tab completion: Press Tab to accept AI suggestions, much faster than typing manually. Even with the free version's limits, it's enough for small projects.

Code chat: There's a chat box on the right where you can ask "what does this code do" or "how to optimize this query." The response quality is better than ChatGPT because it can directly see the code in your project.

---

## Who It's Suitable For

Suitable for:
- Individual developers, students, independent projects
- People wanting to try AI coding without spending money first
- Existing VSCode users (zero migration cost)

Less suitable for:
- Large team collaboration (requires the Teams plan)
- Heavy AI coding users (free version quota insufficient)
- Budget-sensitive users ($20/month isn't cheap)

---

## How to Get Started

1. Go to cursor.com to download
2. After installation, choose the Hobby (free) plan
3. No credit card needed; start using it directly
4. When coding, press Tab to accept completions, or use Cmd+K (Mac) / Ctrl+K (Windows) to invoke the Agent

---

## Internal Link Recommendations

If you're looking for free AI coding tools, these are also worth checking out:

- [AtomCode CodingPlan](/zh/guides/atomcode-codingplan-glm51): Huawei-backed, limited-time free GLM-5.1 access, 30 days of Pro tier
- [通义灵码 (Tongyi Lingma)](/zh/coding/tongyi-lingma): Alibaba Cloud product, free forever for individuals
- [Codeium](/zh/coding/codeium): Free forever for individuals, supports the most IDEs
- [腾讯Marvis (Tencent Marvis)](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent): Free AI assistant, 10 million tokens per day

content_zh:
> 本文基于 Windsurf 官网（windsurf.com/pricing）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（6篇相关文章）、开发者社区实测数据整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

Windsurf 有真正的免费版，$0/月，支持Agent模式。但用量是"Light"级别，用完得等下个月或者升级到$20/月的Pro版。和Cursor比，免费版更慷慨，但模型选择少一些。

---

## Windsurf 是什么

Windsurf（前身是Codeium）做的AI编程IDE。和Cursor一样，基于VSCode改的，但设计理念不同——Windsurf强调"flow state"（心流状态），意思是让你写代码的时候不被打断。

2026年2月被Cognition AI收购。现在是Cursor最大的竞争对手。

核心功能叫Cascade——不只是帮你补全代码，而是能同时编辑多个文件，理解整个项目的上下文。

---

## 免费版到底给什么

![Windsurf AI编程助手 - 免费层可用](/data/articles/windsurf-homepage-2.webp))

Windsurf的Free计划：

- $0/月
- Light用量（具体次数官方没给精确数字，社区反馈大概每月几十次Agent请求）
- 支持基础模型
- Tab补全
- Cascade功能（多文件编辑）
- 不限项目数

和Cursor的Hobby计划比，Windsurf的免费版明确写了"$0/月"和"Light"用量标准，比Cursor的"有限"更透明。

---

## 付费版价格

Free：$0/月，Light用量
Pro：$20/月，Standard用量，支持API价格模型
Max：$200/月，Heavy用量，支持API价格模型
Teams：$40/用户/月，Standard用量
Enterprise：自定义

Pro版和Cursor的Pro版价格一样，都是$20/月。但Windsurf的Max版$200/月是给超重度用户的。

---

## Cascade 功能详解

![Windsurf AI编程助手 - 免费层可用](/data/articles/windsurf-homepage.webp))

Cascade是Windsurf的核心卖点。它不是简单的代码补全，而是一个能理解你整个项目的AI助手。

具体能力：
- 多文件同时编辑：你说"把这个API接口从REST改成GraphQL"，它能同时改路由、改控制器、改前端调用
- 上下文理解：它知道你项目里有哪些文件、用了什么框架、代码风格是什么
- 自然语言交互：用中文描述需求也行，比如"帮我加一个用户登录功能"

实测体验：Cascade在处理跨文件任务时确实比Cursor的Agent模式更流畅。但单文件的代码补全，两者差不多。

---

## 和Cursor怎么选

选Windsurf的理由：
- 免费版更慷慨（至少官方说明更清楚）
- Cascade多文件编辑体验好
- 界面更简洁
- 被Cognition AI收购后资源更充足

选Cursor的理由：
- 市场份额更大，社区资源更多
- 支持的模型更多（GPT-4o、Claude、Gemini等）
- MCPs、skills等扩展生态更成熟
- Cloud agents功能

两个都试试再决定。反正都有免费版。

---

## 学生优惠

Windsurf有学生定价。具体折扣幅度需要在官网验证学生身份后查看。

---

## 适合谁用

适合：
- 想要免费AI编程工具的个人开发者
- 经常需要跨文件重构的项目
- 喜欢简洁界面的人
- 学生（有优惠）

不太适合：
- 需要特定模型（如Claude Opus）的用户
- 超重度AI编程用户（免费版不够）
- 已经深度绑定Cursor生态的团队

---

## 怎么开始

1. 去 windsurf.com 下载
2. 注册账号，选Free计划
3. 不用绑信用卡
4. 打开项目，开始写代码，用Cascade功能

---

## 内部链接推荐

- [Cursor免费版攻略](/zh/guides/cursor-free-ai-coding)：另一款主流AI编程IDE
- [AtomCode CodingPlan](/zh/guides/atomcode-codingplan-glm51)：华为系，限时免费领GLM-5.1
- [Codeium](/zh/coding/codeium)：Windsurf的前身，个人版永久免费
- [通义灵码](/zh/coding/tongyi-lingma)：阿里云出品，个人版永久免费
content_en:
> This article is compiled based on the official Windsurf website (windsurf.com/pricing), Sogou WeChat Official Account search (6 related articles), and developer community real-world testing data. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

Windsurf has a genuine free version, $0/month, with support for Agent mode. However, the usage is "Light" level; once you use it up, you either wait until next month or upgrade to the $20/month Pro plan. Compared to Cursor, its free tier is more generous, but it offers fewer model choices.

---

## What is Windsurf

Windsurf (formerly Codeium) is an AI-powered programming IDE. Like Cursor, it's based on VSCode, but its design philosophy is different—Windsurf emphasizes "flow state," aiming to let you write code without interruptions.

It was acquired by Cognition AI in February 2026. It is now Cursor's biggest competitor.

Its core feature is called Cascade—it doesn't just help you complete code but can simultaneously edit multiple files and understand the context of your entire project.

---

## What Does the Free Tier Actually Include

![Windsurf AI Coding Assistant - Free Tier Available](/data/articles/windsurf-homepage-2.webp))

Windsurf's Free plan:

- $0/month
- Light usage (the official site doesn't give precise numbers; community feedback suggests around several dozen Agent requests per month)
- Supports basic models
- Tab completion
- Cascade feature (multi-file editing)
- Unlimited number of projects

Compared to Cursor's Hobby plan, Windsurf's free tier explicitly states "$0/month" and "Light" usage standards, which is more transparent than Cursor's "limited."

---

## Paid Plan Pricing

Free: $0/month, Light usage
Pro: $20/month, Standard usage, supports API pricing model
Max: $200/month, Heavy usage, supports API pricing model
Teams: $40/user/month, Standard usage
Enterprise: Custom

The Pro plan is the same price as Cursor's Pro plan, both at $20/month. However, Windsurf's Max plan at $200/month is designed for super-heavy users.

---

## Cascade Feature Deep Dive

![Windsurf AI Coding Assistant - Free Tier Available](/data/articles/windsurf-homepage.webp))

Cascade is Windsurf's core selling point. It's not a simple code completion tool; it's an AI assistant that can understand your entire project.

Specific capabilities:
- Multi-file simultaneous editing: When you say "change this API endpoint from REST to GraphQL," it can modify routes, controllers, and frontend calls all at once.
- Context understanding: It knows what files are in your project, what frameworks you're using, and what your coding style is.
- Natural language interaction: You can describe requirements in Chinese, for example, "add a user login function for me."

Real-world testing experience: Cascade is indeed smoother than Cursor's Agent mode when handling cross-file tasks. However, for single-file code completion, both are roughly the same.

---

## How to Choose Between It and Cursor

Reasons to choose Windsurf:
- The free tier is more generous (at least, its official description is clearer)
- The multi-file editing experience with Cascade is good
- The interface is simpler
- More resources after the acquisition by Cognition AI

Reasons to choose Cursor:
- Larger market share, more community resources
- Supports more models (GPT-4o, Claude, Gemini, etc.)
- More mature extension ecosystem with MCPs, skills, etc.
- Cloud agents feature

Try both before deciding. After all, both have a free version.

---

## Student Discount

Windsurf offers student pricing. The specific discount amount requires verifying your student status on the official website to view.

---

## Who Is It For

Suitable for:
- Individual developers wanting a free AI programming tool
- Projects that frequently need cross-file refactoring
- People who prefer a simple interface
- Students (with a discount)

Not ideal for:
- Users who need specific models (like Claude Opus)
- Super-heavy AI programming users (the free tier isn't enough)
- Teams already deeply integrated into the Cursor ecosystem

---

## How to Get Started

1. Go to windsurf.com to download.
2. Register an account and choose the Free plan.
3. No credit card binding is required.
4. Open a project and start coding, using the Cascade feature.

---

## Internal Link Recommendations

- [Cursor Free Version Guide](/zh/guides/cursor-free-ai-coding): Another mainstream AI programming IDE.
- [AtomCode CodingPlan](/zh/guides/atomcode-codingplan-glm51): Huawei-backed, time-limited free GLM-5.1.
- [Codeium](/zh/coding/codeium): Windsurf's predecessor, free forever for the personal version.
- [Tongyi Lingma](/zh/coding/tongyi-lingma): From Alibaba Cloud, free forever for the personal version.

content_zh:
> 本文基于 Perplexity 官网（perplexity.ai）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（8篇相关文章）、科技媒体报道整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

Perplexity 有免费版，每天给有限次Pro搜索（高质量AI搜索），普通搜索不限次数。Pro版$20/月，无限Pro搜索+文件上传+图片生成。做研究、写报告、查资料，比Google好用。

---

## Perplexity 是什么

Perplexity 是一个AI搜索引擎。不是传统的"给你一堆链接"，而是直接给你答案，并且标注了信息来源。

2022年成立，创始人是前Google Brain研究员。2026年估值超过90亿美元。

核心逻辑：搜索 → 阅读 → 总结，一次完成。你问一个问题，它会搜索多个来源，阅读内容，然后给你一个带引用的答案。

---

## 免费版包含什么

![Perplexity AI搜索引擎首页 - 免费AI搜索](/data/articles/perplexity-homepage.webp))

免费版功能：

- 无限次普通搜索（基础模型）
- 每天有限次Pro搜索（高级模型，社区反馈大概5次/天）
- Pro搜索用的是更好的模型，答案质量更高
- 支持追问（Follow-up questions）
- 可以看引用来源
- 支持中文搜索

免费版的限制：
- Pro搜索次数有限
- 不能上传文件分析
- 不能生成图片
- 部分高级功能不开放

---

## Pro版值不值

Pro版：$20/月

包含：
- 无限次Pro搜索
- 文件上传分析（PDF、图片等）
- 图片生成功能
- 更长的答案
- 更好的模型（GPT-4o、Claude等）
- 优先访问新功能

值不值取决于你的使用场景：
- 每天搜索超过5次高质量答案 → 值
- 需要分析PDF/文档 → 值
- 只是偶尔查资料 → 免费版够了

---

## 和其他AI搜索对比

![Perplexity定价页面 - 免费版功能详解](/data/articles/perplexity-pricing-real.webp))

Perplexity vs ChatGPT Search vs Kimi vs 秘塔AI搜索

Perplexity的优势：
- 来源透明度最高，每个答案都有引用
- 学术搜索效果好
- 界面简洁，搜索体验流畅
- 支持追问和深度研究

Perplexity的劣势：
- 中文内容索引不如国产工具
- 免费额度有限
- 中文回答的自然度不如Kimi

Kimi的优势：
- 中文理解最好
- 每天有免费额度
- 能联网搜索+长文本处理

秘塔AI搜索的优势：
- 完全免费、无广告
- 中文搜索效果好
- 国内直接访问

---

## 实际使用场景

做研究：问一个学术问题，Perplexity会搜索论文、新闻、论坛，给你一个综合答案，每个观点都有出处。

写报告：给它一个主题，它能帮你收集资料、整理观点、生成大纲。

购物决策：问"2026年最好的降噪耳机是哪款"，它会对比多个来源的评测数据。

技术问题：问"Python怎么处理大文件"，它会搜索Stack Overflow、GitHub、官方文档，给你一个实用的解决方案。

---

## 适合谁用

适合：
- 学生、研究人员（学术搜索+引用规范）
- 内容创作者（快速收集资料）
- 需要高质量信息的人
- 想替代Google搜索的人

不太适合：
- 预算为零且每天需要大量搜索的用户
- 主要搜索中文内容的用户（Kimi或秘塔可能更好）
- 需要离线使用的场景

---

## 怎么开始

1. 去 perplexity.ai 注册
2. 不用绑信用卡，直接开始搜索
3. 免费版每天有Pro搜索额度，用完自动切回普通搜索
4. 搜索结果可以直接分享、导出

---

## 内部链接推荐

- [Kimi免费攻略](/zh/llm/kimi)：月之暗面出品，每天免费额度，中文搜索效果好
- [DeepSeek免费攻略](/zh/llm/deepseek)：深度求索，性价比最高的大模型
- [NotebookLM攻略](/zh/guides/notebooklm-free-research)：Google免费AI研究工具，适合深度学习
- [腾讯Marvis](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent)：免费AI助手，每天1000万Tokens
content_en:
> This article is based on Perplexity's official website (perplexity.ai), Sogou WeChat Official Account search (8 related articles), and tech media reports. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## TL;DR

Perplexity has a free version that offers a limited number of Pro searches (high-quality AI-powered search) each day, with unlimited regular searches. The Pro version costs $20/month and includes unlimited Pro searches, file uploads, and image generation. For research, report writing, and information gathering, it's more useful than Google.

---

## What is Perplexity?

Perplexity is an AI search engine. Unlike traditional search engines that "give you a bunch of links," it directly provides answers and cites its information sources.

Founded in 2022 by former Google Brain researchers, it was valued at over $9 billion in 2026.

Core logic: Search → Read → Summarize, all in one step. You ask a question, it searches multiple sources, reads the content, and then gives you an answer with citations.

---

## What's Included in the Free Version?

![Perplexity AI Search Engine - Free AI Search](/data/articles/perplexity-homepage.webp))

Free version features:

- Unlimited regular searches (using the basic model)
- A limited number of Pro searches per day (using the advanced model, community feedback suggests ~5/day)
- Pro searches use a better model, resulting in higher-quality answers
- Supports follow-up questions
- You can see citation sources
- Supports Chinese search

Limitations of the free version:
- Limited number of Pro searches
- Cannot upload files for analysis
- Cannot generate images
- Some advanced features are not available

---

## Is the Pro Version Worth It?

Pro version: $20/month

Includes:
- Unlimited Pro searches
- File upload and analysis (PDFs, images, etc.)
- Image generation
- Longer answers
- Better models (GPT-4o, Claude, etc.)
- Early access to new features

Whether it's worth it depends on your use case:
- If you need more than 5 high-quality answers per day → Worth it
- If you need to analyze PDFs/documents → Worth it
- If you only occasionally look up information → The free version is sufficient

---

## Comparison with Other AI Search Tools

![Perplexity Pricing Page - Free Version Details](/data/articles/perplexity-pricing-real.webp))

Perplexity vs ChatGPT Search vs Kimi vs Metaso AI Search

Perplexity's advantages:
- Highest source transparency, with citations for every answer
- Excellent performance for academic searches
- Clean interface, smooth search experience
- Supports follow-up questions and deep research

Perplexity's disadvantages:
- Chinese content indexing isn't as good as domestic tools
- Limited free quota
- Chinese answer naturalness is not as good as Kimi's

Kimi's advantages:
- Best Chinese comprehension
- Offers a free daily quota
- Supports internet search + long text processing

Metaso AI Search's advantages:
- Completely free, no ads
- Good Chinese search performance
- Directly accessible within China

---

## Practical Use Cases

Academic Research: Ask a scholarly question, and Perplexity will search papers, news, and forums to give you a comprehensive answer, with sources cited for each point.

Report Writing: Give it a topic, and it can help you gather materials, organize viewpoints, and generate an outline.

Shopping Decisions: Ask "What's the best noise-canceling headphone in 2026?" and it will compare review data from multiple sources.

Technical Questions: Ask "How to process large files in Python?" and it will search Stack Overflow, GitHub, and official documentation to provide a practical solution.

---

## Who Is It Best For?

Suitable for:
- Students and researchers (academic search + citation formatting)
- Content creators (quickly gathering materials)
- Anyone who needs high-quality information
- People looking to replace Google Search

Not ideal for:
- Users with zero budget who need to search heavily every day
- Users primarily searching for Chinese content (Kimi or Metaso might be better)
- Scenarios requiring offline use

---

## How to Get Started

1. Go to perplexity.ai and register.
2. No need to link a credit card; start searching directly.
3. The free version has a daily Pro search quota; once used, it automatically switches back to regular search.

content_zh:
> 本文基于 NotebookLM 官网（notebooklm.google.com）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（6篇相关文章）、科技媒体报道整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

NotebookLM 是Google出的AI研究工具，完全免费。每个笔记本最多放50个来源（PDF、网页、YouTube视频等），AI帮你阅读、总结、生成播客、生成视频解说。2026年最被低估的免费AI工具。

---

## NotebookLM 是什么

NotebookLM 是Google做的AI笔记本工具。你把资料丢进去（PDF、网页链接、YouTube视频、Google Docs等），它帮你阅读、理解、总结、生成内容。

2023年发布，2025-2026年大幅更新。现在功能包括：

- 文档分析和问答
- 自动生成播客（Audio Overview）
- 自动生成视频解说（Video Overview，2026年3月新功能）
- 自动生成报告（Reports功能）
- 思维导图生成
- 多来源交叉引用

关键点：完全免费。不需要订阅，不需要绑卡，用Google账号就能用。

---

## 免费版包含什么

![Google NotebookLM - 完全免费无使用限制](/data/articles/notebooklm-homepage-2.webp))

NotebookLM的免费版就是完整版——目前没有付费计划。

免费额度：
- 每个笔记本最多50个来源
- 单个来源上限50万字
- 不限笔记本数量
- 播客生成不限次数
- 视频解说生成不限次数
- 报告生成不限次数

没有水印，没有时长限制，没有分辨率限制。

---

## 核心功能详解

### 文档分析

上传PDF、粘贴网页链接、导入YouTube视频，NotebookLM会自动提取内容。然后你可以问它任何关于这些资料的问题，它会基于原文回答，不会瞎编。

比如你上传了3篇论文，问"这三篇论文的研究方法有什么区别"，它会逐一对比，引用具体段落。

### 播客生成（Audio Overview）

这是NotebookLM最火的功能。一键把你的资料变成两个人对话的播客。

生成的播客不是机器人念稿，是两个AI主持人在讨论你的资料，有提问、有回答、有互动。听起来很自然。

用途：
- 把论文变成播客，通勤路上听
- 把技术文档变成对话，更容易理解
- 把会议记录变成总结播客

### 视频解说（Video Overview）

2026年3月新功能。和播客类似，但生成的是视频形式的解说。适合视觉学习者。

### 报告生成（Reports）

2026年新增功能。从原始材料一步生成完整报告，包括结构、引用、总结。

---

## 实际使用场景

![Google NotebookLM - 完全免费无使用限制](/data/articles/notebooklm-homepage.webp))

学术研究：上传10篇论文，让NotebookLM帮你找共同点、对比方法论、生成文献综述大纲。

学习新领域：找10篇关于某个话题的文章，全部导入NotebookLM，让它帮你快速理解这个领域。

产品调研：导入竞品的官网、评测文章、用户反馈，让AI帮你做竞品分析。

读书笔记：导入电子书的PDF，让AI帮你做章节总结、提取关键观点。

会议记录：导入会议录音转写的文字，让AI帮你提取行动项、总结决策。

---

## 和ChatGPT比有什么区别

ChatGPT是通用AI助手，NotebookLM是专用研究工具。

ChatGPT的优势：
- 通用性更强，什么都能聊
- 插件生态丰富
- 可以生成代码、图片等

NotebookLM的优势：
- 基于你的资料回答，不瞎编（RAG技术）
- 播客生成功能独一无二
- 完全免费，没有额度限制
- 和Google生态集成（Docs、Drive等）

最佳组合：用NotebookLM做研究和资料整理，用ChatGPT做创意和生成。

---

## 怎么开始

1. 去 notebooklm.google.com
2. 用Google账号登录
3. 新建笔记本
4. 上传资料（PDF、网页链接、YouTube链接等）
5. 开始提问、生成播客、生成报告

---

## 注意事项

- 需要Google账号，国内访问可能需要VPN
- 生成的播客目前只有英文版（中文支持在开发中）
- 资料上传后存储在Google服务器上，敏感资料注意
- 2026年可能推出付费版（Google One集成），但目前完全免费

---

## 内部链接推荐

- [腾讯Marvis](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent)：免费AI助手，每天1000万Tokens
content_en:
> This article is compiled based on the official NotebookLM website (notebooklm.google.com), Sogou WeChat Official Account search (6 related articles), and tech media reports. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

NotebookLM is an AI research tool from Google, completely free. Each notebook can hold up to 50 sources (PDFs, webpages, YouTube videos, etc.). The AI helps you read, summarize, generate podcasts, and create video narrations. It's the most underrated free AI tool of 2026.

---

## What is NotebookLM

NotebookLM is an AI notebook tool made by Google. You put your materials into it (PDFs, webpage links, YouTube videos, Google Docs, etc.), and it helps you read, understand, summarize, and generate content.

Launched in 2023, it received major updates in 2025-2026. Current features include:

- Document analysis and Q&A
- Automatic podcast generation (Audio Overview)
- Automatic video narration generation (Video Overview, a new feature in March 2026)
- Automatic report generation (Reports feature)
- Mind map generation
- Multi-source cross-referencing

The key point: completely free. No subscription required, no credit card needed. Just use a Google account.

---

## What's Included in the Free Version

![Google NotebookLM - Completely Free No Limits](/data/articles/notebooklm-homepage-2.webp)

The free version of NotebookLM is the full version—there is currently no paid plan.

Free quota:
- Up to 50 sources per notebook
- Up to 500,000 words per single source
- No limit on the number of notebooks
- Unlimited podcast generation
- Unlimited video narration generation
- Unlimited report generation

No watermarks, no duration limits, no resolution limits.

---

## Core Features in Detail

### Document Analysis

Upload PDFs, paste webpage links, or import YouTube videos, and NotebookLM will automatically extract the content. You can then ask it any question about these materials, and it will answer based on the original text without making things up.

For example, if you upload 3 papers and ask, "What are the differences in research methods between these three papers?", it will compare them one by one, citing specific paragraphs.

### Podcast Generation (Audio Overview)

This is NotebookLM's most popular feature. With one click, turn your materials into a podcast of two people conversing.

The generated podcast isn't a robot reading a script; it's two AI hosts discussing your materials, with questions, answers, and interactions. It sounds very natural.

Use cases:
- Turn papers into podcasts to listen to during your commute
- Turn technical documents into dialogues for easier understanding
- Turn meeting notes into summary podcasts

### Video Narration (Video Overview)

A new feature in March 2026. Similar to the podcast, but it generates a video-format narration. Suitable for visual learners.

### Report Generation (Reports)

A new feature added in 2026. Generate a complete report from raw materials in one step, including structure, citations, and summaries.

---

## Practical Use Cases

![Google NotebookLM - Completely Free No Limits](/data/articles/notebooklm-homepage.webp)

Academic Research: Upload 10 papers, and let NotebookLM help you find commonalities, compare methodologies, and generate a literature review outline.

Learning a New Field: Find 10 articles on a topic, import them all into NotebookLM, and let it help you quickly understand that field.

Product Research: Import competitors' official websites, review articles, and user feedback, and let the AI help you conduct competitive analysis.

Reading Notes: Import the PDF of an e-book, and let the AI help you create chapter summaries and extract key points.

Meeting Notes: Import the text transcribed from a meeting recording, and let the AI help you extract action items and summarize decisions.

---

## How is it Different from ChatGPT

ChatGPT is a general-purpose AI assistant, while NotebookLM is a specialized research tool.

ChatGPT's strengths:
- More versatile, can chat about anything
- Rich plugin ecosystem
- Can generate code, images, etc.

NotebookLM's strengths:
- Answers based on your materials, doesn't make things up (RAG technology)
- Unique podcast generation feature
- Completely free, no quota limits
- Integrated with Google ecosystem (Docs, Drive, etc.)

Best combination: Use NotebookLM for research and material organization, use ChatGPT for creativity and generation.

---

## How to Get Started

1. Go to notebooklm.google.com
2. Log in with a Google account
3. Create a new notebook
4. Upload materials (PDFs, webpage links, YouTube links, etc.)
5. Start asking questions, generating podcasts, and creating reports

---

## Notes

- Requires a Google account. Access from within China may require a VPN.
- Currently, generated podcasts are only available in English (Chinese support is in development).
- Uploaded materials are stored on Google servers—be mindful of sensitive information.
- A paid version may be launched in 2026 (Google One integration), but it is currently completely free.

---

## Recommended Internal Links

- [Perplexity Free Guide](/zh/guides/perplexity-free-ai-search): AI search engine, suitable for quick information retrieval
- [DeepSeek Free Guide](/zh/llm/deepseek): Most cost-effective large model, suitable for daily conversation
- [Kimi Free Guide](/zh/llm/kimi): By Moonshot AI, strong in long-text processing
- [Tencent Marvis](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent): Free AI assistant, 10 million tokens per day

> 本文基于 Ideogram 官网（ideogram.ai）、搜狗微信公众号搜索（6篇相关文章）、科技媒体报道整理，数据截至2026年5月21日。

---

## 一句话总结

Ideogram 是AI图片生成工具里文字渲染最准的。免费版每天可以生成一定数量的图片（社区反馈约每天25张），分辨率够用，没有水印。前Google Brain团队做的，2026年2月发布3.0版本。

---

## Ideogram 是什么

Ideogram 是一个AI图片生成工具。和Midjourney、DALL-E、Stable Diffusion是同类产品，但有一个独特优势：文字渲染。

什么意思？就是你让它生成一张海报，上面写"Happy Birthday"，它真的能把这行字写对。其他AI图片工具生成的文字经常是乱码或者扭曲的。

创始人是前Google Brain研究员。2026年2月发布Ideogram 3.0版本，文字渲染能力大幅提升。

---

## 免费版包含什么

![Ideogram AI图片生成器 - 每日25张免费额度](/data/articles/ideogram-homepage-2.webp))

Ideogram有免费版（Free计划）：

- 每天约25张图片生成（社区实测数据，官方未公布精确数字）
- 支持文字渲染（这是核心卖点）
- 基础分辨率
- 没有水印
- 可以商用（需查看最新协议）

免费版的限制：
- 每天生成数量有限
- 不支持最高分辨率
- 排队可能较慢
- 部分高级功能不开放

---

## 付费版价格

根据社区信息和科技媒体报道：

Free：$0/天，约25张/天
Basic：约$7/月，更多生成次数
Plus：约$16/月，更高分辨率+优先队列
Pro：约$48/月，最大分辨率+商用授权

（注：具体价格可能随时调整，以官网为准。Ideogram官网有Cloudflare防护，价格信息来自社区和媒体报道。）

---

## 核心能力

### 文字渲染

![Ideogram AI图片生成器 - 每日25张免费额度](/data/articles/ideogram-homepage.webp))

Ideogram的招牌功能。让AI在图片上写字，其他工具经常出错，Ideogram基本能写对。

用途：
- 海报设计（标题文字）
- Logo设计（品牌名称）
- 社交媒体图片（带文字的配图）
- 产品展示（产品名称）

### 风格多样

支持多种风格：写实、插画、3D、水彩、油画、像素风等。用提示词指定风格就行。

### 图片编辑

支持上传图片后修改、扩展、局部重绘。免费版也有基础编辑功能。

---

## 和其他AI图片工具对比

Ideogram vs Midjourney vs DALL-E vs Stable Diffusion

Ideogram的优势：
- 文字渲染最准
- 有免费版
- 界面友好，不用学复杂参数
- 网页端直接用，不用装软件

Midjourney的优势：
- 画质最好（尤其艺术风格）
- 社区活跃
- 风格化能力最强

DALL-E的优势：
- 和ChatGPT集成
- 理解复杂提示词
- 编辑能力强

Stable Diffusion的优势：
- 开源免费
- 可以本地部署
- 模型最多，可定制性最强

---

## 实际使用场景

做海报：告诉Ideogram"设计一个科技感的海报，标题写'AI Conference 2026'"，它能生成带正确文字的海报。

做Logo：输入品牌名和风格描述，生成带品牌名的Logo方案。

做社交媒体配图：比如"一个程序员在咖啡馆写代码的插画，上面写'Code & Coffee'"。

做产品展示：产品名+描述，生成产品展示图。

---

## 适合谁用

适合：
- 需要带文字的图片（海报、Logo、配图）

- 设计师找灵感
