content_en:
This article is compiled based on the official Ideogram website (ideogram.ai), Sogou WeChat Official Account search (6 related articles), and technology media reports. Data is current as of May 21, 2026.

---

## One-sentence Summary

Ideogram is the most accurate AI image generation tool for text rendering. The free version allows generating a certain number of images per day (community feedback suggests about 25 images daily), with usable resolution and no watermarks. It was created by a former Google Brain team, and version 3.0 was released in February 2026.

---

## What is Ideogram

Ideogram is an AI image generation tool. It is a competitor to Midjourney, DALL-E, and Stable Diffusion, but with one unique advantage: text rendering.

What does that mean? If you ask it to generate a poster that says "Happy Birthday," it will actually render the text correctly. Other AI image tools often produce garbled or distorted text in images.

The founder is a former Google Brain researcher. In February 2026, Ideogram 3.0 was released, featuring significantly improved text rendering capabilities.

---

## What's Included in the Free Version

![Ideogram AI Image Generator - 25 Free Images Daily](/data/articles/ideogram-homepage-2.webp))

Ideogram offers a free version (Free Plan):

- Approximately 25 image generations per day (based on community-tested data; the official has not released exact numbers)
- Supports text rendering (this is its core selling point)
- Basic resolution
- No watermarks
- Can be used commercially (check the latest terms for details)

Limitations of the free version:
- Daily generation limit
- Does not support the highest resolution
- Queues may be slower
- Some advanced features are not available

---

## Paid Version Pricing

Based on community information and technology media reports:

Free: $0/day, approx. 25 images/day
Basic: approx. $7/month, more generations
Plus: approx. $16/month, higher resolution + priority queue
Pro: approx. $48/month, maximum resolution + commercial license

(Note: Prices are subject to change; refer to the official website for the latest. The Ideogram website has Cloudflare protection; pricing information comes from community and media sources.)

---

## Core Capabilities

### Text Rendering

![Ideogram AI Image Generator - 25 Free Images Daily](/data/articles/ideogram-homepage.webp))

Ideogram's flagship feature. It enables AI to write text on images, which other tools frequently get wrong, while Ideogram usually renders it correctly.

Use cases:
- Poster design (headline text)
- Logo design (brand names)
- Social media graphics (images with text overlays)
- Product showcase (product names)

### Diverse Styles

Supports various styles: realistic, illustration, 3D, watercolor, oil painting, pixel art, etc. You can specify the style using prompts.

### Image Editing

Supports uploading an image for modification, expansion, or partial redrawing. The free version also includes basic editing features.

---

## Comparison with Other AI Image Tools

Ideogram vs. Midjourney vs. DALL-E vs. Stable Diffusion

Ideogram's strengths:
- Most accurate text rendering
- Has a free version
- User-friendly interface, no need to learn complex parameters
- Works directly in a web browser, no software installation required

Midjourney's strengths:
- Best image quality (especially for artistic styles)
- Active community
- Strongest stylistic capabilities

DALL-E's strengths:
- Integrated with ChatGPT
- Understands complex prompts
- Strong editing capabilities

Stable Diffusion's strengths:
- Open-source and free
- Can be deployed locally
- Largest number of models, highest customizability

---

## Practical Use Cases

Making posters: Tell Ideogram, "Design a tech-themed poster with the title 'AI Conference 2026'," and it can generate a poster with the correct text.

Creating logos: Input a brand name and style description to generate logo concepts featuring the brand name.

Making social media graphics: For example, "An illustration of a programmer writing code in a café, with the text 'Code & Coffee'."

Product showcase: Product name + description to generate product display images.

---

## Who Is It Suitable For?

Suitable for:
- Users needing images with text (posters, logos, graphics)
- Individuals who want AI images without spending money
- Designers seeking inspiration
- Content creators needing graphics

Not ideal for:
- Commercial projects requiring ultra-high-definition, large-format images (free version resolution is limited)
- Users seeking ultimate artistic styles (Midjourney is better)
- Users wanting local deployment (not supported)

---

## How to Get Started

1. Go to ideogram.ai to register
2. No credit card required
3. Enter a description (prompt), select a style, and click generate
4. The free version allows generating approximately 25 images per day

---

## Recommended Internal Links

- [Perplexity Free Guide](/zh/guides/perplexity-free-ai-search): AI search for finding design inspiration
- [Tongyi Qianwen Free Guide](/zh/llm/qwen): Alibaba Cloud offering with strong multimodal capabilities
- [Tencent Marvis](/zh/guides/tencent-marvis-free-agent): Free AI assistant, 10 million Tokens per day
- [AtomCode CodingPlan](/zh/guides/atomcode-codingplan-glm51): Huawei ecosystem, limited-time free access to GLM-5.1

title_zh: Freebuff免费AI编程Agent：广告换免费，终端里跑DeepSeek V4写代码
title_en: Freebuff Free AI Coding Agent: Ads for Free, Run DeepSeek V4 in Terminal
description_zh: Freebuff是Codebuff的免费版，用广告换免费AI编程额度。终端里装一个命令行工具，免费用DeepSeek V4 Flash、Kimi K2.6等国产模型写代码，内置9个子Agent，支持代码审查和浏览器操作。
description_en: Freebuff is Codebuff's free version, trading ads for AI coding credits. Install a CLI tool, use DeepSeek V4 Flash, Kimi K2.6 and other models for free. 9 built-in sub-agents, code review and browser use.

faq_zh.a: 是的。Freebuff靠终端内的广告收入补贴模型成本，用户不需要付费。社区反馈每天大约能免费用5小时左右。
默认用DeepSeek V4 Flash，也支持DeepSeek V4 Pro、Kimi K2.6、MiniMax M2.7。文件搜索用Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite，深度思考用GPT-5.4（需要ChatGPT订阅）。
Freebuff免费但有广告，Claude Code 20美元/月但体验更完整。如果预算有限，Freebuff是很好的入门选择。
用DeepSeek V4 Flash或Kimi K2.6是安全的，这两个模型不会用你的数据训练。注意不要用DeepSeek V4 Pro，它的API会拿请求数据做训练。
一行命令：npm install -g freebuff。然后进项目目录敲freebuff就能用了。需要Node.js环境。
目前不是所有国家都可用，具体查看freebuff.com官网的说明。

faq_en.q: Is Freebuff really completely free?
faq_en.a: Yes. Freebuff is supported by ads shown in the CLI. Users pay nothing. Community reports ~5 hours of free use per day.

faq_en.q: What models does Freebuff use?
faq_en.a: Default is DeepSeek V4 Flash. Also supports DeepSeek V4 Pro, Kimi K2.6, MiniMax M2.7. File search uses Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite. Deep thinking uses GPT-5.4 (requires ChatGPT subscription).

faq_en.q: Freebuff vs Claude Code, which is better?
faq_en.a: Freebuff is free but has ads. Claude Code is $20/mo but more polished. Freebuff is great for budget-conscious developers.

faq_en.q: Is Freebuff safe for company code?
faq_en.a: Using DeepSeek V4 Flash or Kimi K2.6 is safe - they don't train on your data. Avoid DeepSeek V4 Pro which does train on API requests.

faq_en.q: How to install Freebuff?
faq_en.a: One command: npm install -g freebuff. Then cd to your project and run freebuff. Requires Node.js.

faq_en.q: Which countries is Freebuff available in?
faq_en.a: Not available everywhere. Check freebuff.com for the full list of supported countries.

content_zh:
最近 AI Coding 圈有个项目挺火——Freebuff。一句话说清楚：装一个命令行工具，免费用 DeepSeek V4 Flash 写代码，代价是终端里会显示几条广告。

听起来像不像当年免费版杀毒软件的路子？360 靠广告活了好多年，Freebuff 把这招搬到了 AI 编程工具上。

## Freebuff 是什么

Freebuff 是 Codebuff 的免费版。Codebuff 本身是个付费的 AI 编程助手（月费 100-500 美元），Freebuff 则是靠广告收入补贴模型成本，让用户零成本使用。

安装就一行命令：

npm install -g freebuff

装完之后进你的项目目录，敲 freebuff 就能开始用了。没有注册流程，没有 API Key 配置，没有模式选择——打开就干。

## 它背后用了哪些模型

![FreeBuff AI编程Agent - 国产免费替代方案](/data/articles/freebuff-homepage-2.webp))

这是很多人关心的部分。Freebuff 并不是只用一个模型，而是根据任务类型分配不同的模型：

主力编程模型（四选一）：
- DeepSeek V4 Flash（默认，最快）
- DeepSeek V4 Pro（最聪明，但 API 会拿数据训练）
- Kimi K2.6（月之暗面出品）
- MiniMax M2.7

辅助模型：
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite：负责文件搜索和网页研究
- GPT-5.4：负责深度思考（需要你自己的 ChatGPT 订阅）

注意一个细节：DeepSeek V4 Pro 虽然最聪明，但它的 API 会拿你的请求数据做训练。如果你写的是公司代码，建议用 V4 Flash 或者 Kimi K2.6。

## 免费的含金量

Freebuff 不是那种"免费试用 3 天然后逼你付费"的套路。它是真正的免费——只要你能忍受终端里的广告。

根据官方说明：
- 不存储你的代码库
- 不拿你的数据训练模型
- 只收集少量调试日志
- 广告收入覆盖模型调用成本

实际体验上，Reddit 上有用户反馈"每天大概能免费用 5 小时左右"，这个数字没有官方确认，但多个用户交叉验证过。

## 和 Claude Code、Cursor 比怎么样

![FreeBuff AI编程Agent - 国产免费替代方案](/data/articles/freebuff-homepage.webp))

这三个都是终端里的 AI 编程工具，但定位完全不同：

Freebuff：
- 价格：免费（广告换额度）
- 模型：DeepSeek V4 Flash 等
- 特点：开箱即用，零配置
- 适合：预算有限的个人开发者

Codebuff（付费版）：
- 价格：100-500 美元/月，或 1 美分/积分
- 模型：OpenRouter 上的任意模型
- 特点：支持自定义 Agent 工作流
- 适合：专业团队

Claude Code：
- 价格：20 美元/月（Claude Pro）
- 模型：Claude Sonnet/Opus
- 特点：Anthropic 官方出品
- 适合：已经在用 Claude 生态的用户

Cursor：
- 价格：免费版有限制，Pro 20 美元/月
- 模型：多模型切换
- 特点：IDE 集成，不只是终端
- 适合：习惯 GUI 编辑器的用户

官方评测数据：Codebuff 在 175+ 编程任务的内部评测中，得分 61%，Claude Code 53%。不过这个数据是 Codebuff 自己做的，参考一下就好。

## 9 个内置子 Agent

Freebuff 不是一个简单的"你问我答"工具。它内置了 9 个专门的子 Agent，各司其职：

- Code Review Agent：自动审查代码变更
- Browser Use Agent：能操作浏览器做测试
- Deep Thinking Agent：复杂问题深度分析
- File Picker Agent：扫描项目结构找相关文件
- Planner Agent：规划修改步骤和顺序
- Editor Agent：精确编辑代码
- Reviewer Agent：验证修改是否正确
- Web Research Agent：联网搜索技术方案
- 多 Agent 协同：多个 Agent 配合完成复杂任务

用 @AgentName 就能调用特定 Agent，比如 @review 让它审查代码。

## 怎么用

装好之后，进你的项目目录：

cd ~/your-project
freebuff

然后直接用自然语言告诉它你要做什么：

"给 user API 加上速率限制"
"修复用户注册里的 SQL 注入漏洞"
"重构数据库连接代码"

它会自动找文件、改代码、跑测试。

几个实用命令：
- @filename：引用特定文件
- !command：直接跑终端命令
- /history：查看历史对话
- /init：生成项目知识文件
- /theme:toggle：切换明暗主题

## 这个思路为什么值得关注

过去大家默认"强 AI = 贵"。Claude Code 20 美元/月，GitHub Copilot 10 美元/月，Cursor Pro 20 美元/月。对于刚入行的开发者或者学生来说，这笔钱不算小。

Freebuff 验证了一个商业模式：广告换模型额度。终端里展示几条文字广告，用户免费用顶级模型。这个逻辑其实很朴素——就像早期互联网的免费邮箱、免费导航一样。

更深层的意义在于：DeepSeek V4 Flash 这种高性能模型的出现，把 AI 编程的成本门槛打到了接近零。以前要花几百美元才能跑的 Agent 工作流，现在一个 npm install 就能开始。

## 限制和注意事项

说几个实际使用中需要注意的：

1. 广告体验：终端里会有文字广告，不影响功能但确实会影响体验。如果你很在意这个，可以考虑付费版 Codebuff。

2. 模型数据安全：DeepSeek V4 Pro 会用 API 请求数据训练。写公司代码的话，用 V4 Flash 或 Kimi K2.6 更安全。

3. 地区限制：目前不是所有国家都能用，具体看 freebuff.com 的说明。

4. 模型不是最新的：Freebuff 用的是优化过的模型版本，不一定是各厂商最新的模型。但对日常编程来说够用了。

5. 需要联网：Freebuff 是云端运行的，不是本地模型，需要网络连接。

## 值不值得试

如果你是以下情况，值得一试：

- 预算有限但想体验 AI 编程
- 想试试 DeepSeek V4 Flash 的编程能力
- 不想折腾复杂的配置
- 能接受终端里有几条广告

如果你是以下情况，可能不太适合：

- 公司代码有严格安全要求
- 需要离线使用
- 对广告零容忍
- 需要 IDE 集成而不是纯终端

总之，Freebuff 证明了一件事：2026 年，高质量 AI 编程工具已经可以完全免费了。至于你愿不愿意用广告换这个免费，看个人选择。

安装：npm install -g freebuff
官网：https://freebuff.com/
GitHub：https://github.com/CodebuffAI/codebuff
content_en:
Recently, there's a pretty hot project in the AI Coding scene—Freebuff. To put it simply: install one command-line tool, use DeepSeek V4 Flash for free to write code, and the trade-off is that a few ads will display in your terminal.

Doesn't it sound familiar? Like the old free antivirus software model? 360 survived for years on ads, and Freebuff has brought that tactic to AI programming tools.

## What is Freebuff

Freebuff is the free version of Codebuff. Codebuff itself is a paid AI programming assistant (monthly fee $100-$500), while Freebuff subsidizes model costs through ad revenue, allowing users to use it at zero cost.

Installation is just one command:

npm install -g freebuff

After installation, navigate to your project directory and type freebuff to start using it. No registration process, no API Key configuration, no mode selection—open and go.

## Which models does it use behind the scenes

![FreeBuff AI Coding Agent - Free Chinese Alternative](/data/articles/freebuff-homepage-2.webp))

This is the part many people are interested in. Freebuff doesn't just use one model; it assigns different models based on the task type:

Primary coding model (choose one from four):
- DeepSeek V4 Flash (Default, fastest)
- DeepSeek V4 Pro (Smartest, but the API uses data for training)
- Kimi K2.6 (by Moonshot AI)
- MiniMax M2.7

Auxiliary models:
- Gemini 3.1 Flash Lite: Handles file search and web research
- GPT-5.4: Handles deep thinking (requires your own ChatGPT subscription)

Note one detail: Although DeepSeek V4 Pro is the smartest, its API uses your request data for training. If you're writing company code, it's recommended to use V4 Flash or Kimi K2.6.

## What does "free" really mean

Freebuff isn't the "free trial for 3 days then force you to pay" kind of trap. It's truly free—as long as you can tolerate the ads in the terminal.

According to the official description:
- Does not store your codebase
- Does not use your data to train models
- Only collects a small amount of debug logs
- Ad revenue covers model invocation costs

In terms of actual experience, Reddit users have reported "you can use it for free for about 5 hours a day." This number isn't officially confirmed but has been cross-verified by multiple users.

## How does it compare to Claude Code and Cursor

![FreeBuff AI Coding Agent - Free Chinese Alternative](/data/articles/freebuff-homepage.webp))

These three are all AI programming tools in the terminal, but their positioning is completely different:

Freebuff:
- Price: Free (ads in exchange for credits)
- Models: DeepSeek V4 Flash, etc.
- Features: Out-of-the-box, zero configuration
- Suitable for: Individual developers with limited budgets

Codebuff (paid version):
- Price: $100-$500/month, or 1 cent/credit
- Models: Any model on OpenRouter
- Features: Supports custom Agent workflows
- Suitable for: Professional teams

Claude Code:
- Price: $20/month (Claude Pro)
- Models: Claude Sonnet/Opus
- Features: Official from Anthropic
- Suitable for: Users already in the Claude ecosystem

Cursor:
- Price: Free version has limitations, Pro $20/month
- Models: Multi-model switching
- Features: IDE integration, not just terminal
- Suitable for: Users accustomed to GUI editors

Official benchmark data: Codebuff scored 61% in an internal evaluation of 175+ coding tasks, compared to Claude Code's 53%. However, this data is from Codebuff itself, so take it with a grain of salt.

## 9 built-in sub-Agents

Freebuff isn't just a simple "ask and answer" tool. It has 9 built-in specialized sub-Agents, each with its own role:

- Code Review Agent: Automatically reviews code changes
- Browser Use Agent: Can operate browsers for testing
- Deep Thinking Agent: In-depth analysis of complex problems
- File Picker Agent: Scans project structure to find relevant files
- Planner Agent: Plans modification steps and sequence
- Editor Agent: Precisely edits code
- Reviewer Agent: Verifies if modifications are correct
- Web Research Agent: Searches the web for technical solutions
- Multi-Agent collaboration: Multiple Agents work together to complete complex tasks

Use @AgentName to invoke a specific Agent, for example, @review to have it review code.

## How to use

After installation, navigate to your project directory:

cd ~/your-project
freebuff

Then tell it what you want to do using natural language:

"Add rate limiting to the user API"
"Fix SQL injection vulnerabilities in user registration"
"Refactor database connection code"

It will automatically find files, modify code, and run tests.

A few practical commands:
- @filename: Reference a specific file
- !command: Run a terminal command directly
- /history: View conversation history
- /init: Generate a project knowledge file
- /theme:toggle: Switch between light and dark themes

## Why this approach is worth paying attention to

Previously, the default assumption was "strong AI = expensive." Claude Code at $20/month, GitHub Copilot at $10/month, Cursor Pro at $20/month. For developers just starting out or students, this isn't a small amount of money.

Freebuff has validated a business model: exchanging ads for model credits. Displaying a few text ads in the terminal allows users to use top-tier models for free. This logic is actually quite straightforward—just like the free email and free navigation services of the early internet.

The deeper significance lies in this: The emergence of high-performance models like DeepSeek V4 Flash has driven the cost threshold of AI programming close to zero. Agent workflows that previously cost hundreds of dollars to run can now be started with a single npm install.

## Limitations and precautions

Here are a few things to note for actual use:

1. Ad experience: There will be text ads in the terminal; they don't affect functionality but certainly impact the experience. If this bothers you, consider the paid version, Codebuff.

2. Model data security: DeepSeek V4 Pro uses API request data for training. If you're writing company code, using V4 Flash or Kimi K2.6 is safer.

3. Regional restrictions: Currently, not all countries can use it. Check freebuff.com for specific details.

4. Models aren't the latest: Freebuff uses optimized versions of models, which may not necessarily be the latest from each provider. However, they are sufficient for everyday programming.

5. Requires internet connection: Freebuff runs in the cloud, not as a local model, so it needs an internet connection.

## Is it worth trying

It's worth a try if you are:

- On a limited budget but want to experience AI programming
- Want to try DeepSeek V4 Flash's coding capabilities
- Don't want to fuss with complex configurations
- Can tolerate a few ads in the terminal

It might not be suitable if you are:

- Working with company code that has strict security requirements
- Need to use it offline
- Have zero tolerance for ads
- Need IDE integration instead of pure terminal

title_zh: 豆包收费了！2026年免费版还够用吗？Pro版值不值68元/月
title_en: Doubao Now Paid! Is the 2026 Free Version Still Enough? Is Pro Version Worth 68 yuan/month
description_zh: 豆包开始收费，68元/月起步分三档。免费版没砍但高性能模式全锁付费墙。本文详解免费版vs付费版区别、竞品对比、替代方案。
description_en: Douban starts charging, starting at 68 yuan/month in three tiers. Free version intact but high-performance modes locked behind paywall. This article details free version vs. paid version differences,

faq_zh.q: 豆包免费版会被砍掉吗？
faq_zh.a: 目前不会。字节的策略是基础免费+高级付费，3.45亿月活的用户基础是豆包最大的资产，不会轻易放弃。

faq_zh.q: Seedance 2.0 视频生成还免费吗？
faq_zh.a: 截至2026年5月，豆包官方首页仍在宣传Seedance 2.0登录即可免费使用。但窗口期能持续多久不确定。
中文对话和写作，豆包Pro更懂中文语境。英文、代码、复杂推理，ChatGPT Plus更强。价格上豆包Pro便宜一半多。

faq_zh.q: 企业用户应该选哪个版本？
faq_zh.a: 如果团队在用飞书，豆包企业版集成度最高。否则考虑通义千问企业版或ChatGPT Team。

faq_zh.q: 豆包收费后质量会提升吗？
faq_zh.a: 这是最大的不确定性。建议等一两个月看看实际用户评价再决定是否付费。

faq_zh.q: 其他国产AI也会跟着收费吗？
faq_zh.a: 大概率会。Kimi、通义千问、文心一言都在试探付费模式。免费AI的窗口期在缩短。

faq_en.q: Will Doubao's free tier be removed?
faq_en.a: Not for now. ByteDance's strategy is free basics + paid premium. The 345M MAU is their biggest asset.

faq_en.q: Is Seedance 2.0 video generation still free?
faq_en.a: As of May 2026, Doubao's homepage still promotes free Seedance 2.0 access. But how long this lasts is uncertain.

faq_en.q: Doubao Pro vs ChatGPT Plus - which is better?
faq_en.a: For Chinese chat and writing, Doubao Pro understands Chinese better. For English, code, and complex reasoning, ChatGPT Plus is stronger. Doubao Pro costs half as much.

faq_en.q: Which version should enterprise users choose?
faq_en.a: If your team uses Feishu (Lark), Doubao Enterprise offers the best integration. Otherwise consider Qwen Enterprise or ChatGPT Team.

faq_en.q: Will quality improve after Doubao starts charging?
faq_en.a: This is the biggest uncertainty. Wait 1-2 months for real user reviews before deciding to pay.

faq_en.q: Will other Chinese AI tools start charging too?
faq_en.a: Most likely. Kimi, Qwen, and Wenxin are all testing paid models. The free AI window is closing.

content_zh:
> 本文基于豆包官方页面、搜狗微信公众号搜索（15+ 篇相关文章）、字节跳动公开信息整理。价格数据截至 2026 年 5 月。

---

## 一句话总结

豆包终于收费了。68 元/月起步，分三档。免费版没砍，但高性能模式、长文档处理、深度推理这些"硬核"功能全锁在付费墙后面。3.45 亿月活的超级 App 开始变现，AI 免费大战的拐点到了。

---

## 豆包为什么突然收费

说"突然"其实不突然。

豆包从 2023 年上线到现在，一直靠字节跳动烧钱补贴。3.45 亿月活用户，每天几十亿次对话请求，算力成本是个天文数字。之前搜狗微信搜索里至少 5 篇文章提到同一个观点：AI 服务和传统互联网产品不一样，边际成本不会趋近于零。

每多一个用户，就多一份 GPU 算力开支。

字节不是慈善机构。豆包收费本质上是：用户量到了，补贴烧不起了，该收网了。

---

## 豆包收费方案详解

![豆包AI定价对比 - 免费额度使用攻略](/data/articles/doubao-pricing-compare.webp))

根据搜狗微信搜索中多篇文章的交叉信息，豆包目前分三档：

**基础版（免费）**

- 日常聊天、问答、写作辅助
- 基础图片理解和生成
- Seedance 2.0 视频生成（免费使用，这是官方首页还在推的）
- 响应速度：标准
- 模型：基础版云雀模型

**Pro 版（68 元/月）**

- 高性能模式：更强的推理能力，复杂任务表现明显提升
- 长文档处理：支持更长的上下文窗口
- 深度推理：数学、逻辑、代码等复杂任务
- 优先响应：高峰期不排队
- 更高的每日使用上限

**Premium 版（200 元/月）**

- Pro 版全部功能
- 更高的使用量上限
- 企业级功能预览
- 优先体验新功能

另外还有 Business 和 Enterprise 版本，面向团队和企业，按用户数收费。

---

## 免费版还够用吗

说句实话：看你怎么用。

如果你就是拿豆包聊天、问天气、写个朋友圈文案、翻译几句话——免费版完全够用。基础版的云雀模型处理这些日常任务没问题。

但如果你是以下场景，免费版就开始捉襟见肘了：

- 写长文、改论文：上下文窗口不够，容易"断片"
- 写代码、调试：推理能力差距明显
- 复杂分析、多步推理：免费版会"一本正经地胡说八道"（这是用户原话）
- 高峰期使用：排队是常态

搜狗微信搜索里有个比喻很到位：免费版和付费版的区别，更像是"普通模式"和"高性能模式"。不是能不能用的问题，是好不好用的问题。

---

## 值不值 68 元

这个问题得看你之前用什么。

**从免费豆包升级到 Pro（68 元/月）**

如果你日常重度使用豆包，68 元换来的高性能模式和更长上下文确实能提升效率。但问题是——同样的钱你能买到什么？

- Kimi：免费版上下文窗口已经很长，付费版功能更全
- DeepSeek：开源模型，API 价格极低
- 通义千问：阿里系，免费额度也不少
- ChatGPT Plus：$20/月（约 145 元），GPT-4o 的能力更强

68 元在国产 AI 里不算贵，但也不算便宜。关键是豆包的模型能力能不能撑起这个价格。

**竞品价格对比**

- 豆包 Pro：68 元/月
- Kimi 会员：约 59 元/月
- 通义千问 Pro：约 49 元/月
- ChatGPT Plus：$20/月（约 145 元）
- Claude Pro：$20/月（约 145 元）

国产 AI 里，豆包的定价偏中上。但豆包的优势在于生态——抖音、今日头条、飞书都在接入，如果你是字节生态用户，这个价格可以接受。

---

## 豆包收费背后的行业信号

这不是豆包一家的事。

搜狗微信搜索里，"AI 免费时代终结"是 2026 年 5 月最热的话题之一。多篇文章提到同一个趋势：免费好用 → 分级收费 → 暗改缩水 → 限额锁死 → 积分收割。

Gemini 免费版在缩水，Claude 免费用户被限流，现在豆包也开始收费。AI 行业的"补贴换用户"阶段基本结束了，接下来是"付费换质量"的阶段。

对普通用户来说，好消息是：基础功能依然免费，不会突然不能用。坏消息是：真正好用的功能，越来越贵。

---

## 豆包免费替代方案

如果你不想花钱，还有这些选择：

**日常聊天和写作**

- DeepSeek：完全免费，模型能力强，开源
- 通义千问：基础版免费，阿里生态
- Kimi：免费版长上下文，适合阅读和总结

**视频生成**

- 可灵 AI：每天 66 免费积分
- 海螺 AI：注册送 300 积分
- 豆包的 Seedance 2.0：目前仍然免费

**编程辅助**

- Cursor：免费版每天 50 次补全
- Windsurf：免费版有基础额度
- Codeium：完全免费的代码补全

---

## 怎么判断要不要付费

三个问题：

1. 你每天用豆包超过 30 分钟吗？如果是，Pro 版的效率提升值得考虑。
2. 你用豆包做什么？如果是聊天和简单写作，免费版够了。如果是工作和学习中的重度使用，考虑付费。
3. 你有替代方案吗？如果 DeepSeek、Kimi 能满足你的需求，没必要为豆包付费。

我的建议：先用免费版，等到真正觉得"不够用"的时候再考虑付费。不要因为"以后可能收费更贵"就冲动下单——AI 工具的价格战才刚开始，未来只会更便宜或者更多选择。

---

## 常见问题

**Q：豆包免费版会被砍掉吗？**

A：目前不会。字节的策略是"基础免费 + 高级付费"，不是"全部收费"。3.45 亿月活的用户基础是豆包最大的资产，不会轻易放弃。

**Q：Seedance 2.0 视频生成还免费吗？**

A：截至 2026 年 5 月，豆包官方首页仍在宣传"Seedance 2.0 登录即可免费使用"。但这个窗口期能持续多久不确定，建议趁现在能用就多用。

**Q：豆包 Pro 版和 ChatGPT Plus 哪个好？**

A：看场景。中文对话和写作，豆包 Pro 更懂中文语境。英文、代码、复杂推理，ChatGPT Plus 更强。价格上豆包 Pro 便宜一半多。

**Q：企业用户应该选哪个版本？**

A：如果团队在用飞书，豆包的企业版（Business/Enterprise）集成度最高。否则考虑通义千问企业版或 ChatGPT Team。

**Q：豆包收费后质量会提升吗？**

A：这是用户最关心的问题，也是最大的不确定性。搜狗微信搜索里多篇文章都在问同一个问题："付费后还是'笨笨的'怎么办？"目前没有足够的用户反馈来判断。建议等一两个月看看实际评价再决定。

**Q：其他国产 AI 也会跟着收费吗？**

A：大概率会。Kimi、通义千问、文心一言都在试探付费模式。免费 AI 的窗口期在缩短，能白嫖的时候抓紧白嫖。
content_en:
This article is compiled based on the official Doubao page, Sogou WeChat Official Account searches (15+ related articles), and public information from ByteDance. Price data is current as of May 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

Doubao has finally started charging. Starting at 68 yuan/month with three tiers. The free version hasn't been cut, but "hardcore" features like high-performance mode, long document processing, and deep reasoning are all locked behind the paywall. The super app with 345 million monthly active users has begun monetizing, marking a turning point in the AI free-for-all battle.

---

## Why Did Doubao Suddenly Start Charging?

Saying "suddenly" is actually not accurate.

From its launch in 2023 until now, Doubao has relied on subsidies from ByteDance. With 345 million monthly active users and billions of daily dialogue requests, the computational cost is astronomical. At least five articles found via Sogou WeChat search shared the same viewpoint: AI services are different from traditional internet products, as their marginal cost does not approach zero.

Every additional user means additional GPU computational expenses.

ByteDance is not a charity. The essence of Doubao's charging is: the user base has grown, the subsidies are unsustainable, and it's time to cash in.

---

## Detailed Breakdown of Doubao's Pricing Plan

![Doubao AI Pricing Comparison - Free Tier Usage Guide](/data/articles/doubao-pricing-compare.webp))

Based on cross-referencing information from multiple articles via Sogou WeChat search, Doubao is currently divided into three tiers:

**Basic (Free)**

- Daily chat, Q&A, and writing assistance.
- Basic image understanding and generation.
- Seedance 2.0 video generation (free to use; this is still promoted on the official homepage).
- Response speed: Standard.
- Model: Basic Lark model.

**Pro (68 yuan/month)**

- High-performance mode: Stronger reasoning ability, with significantly improved performance on complex tasks.
- Long document processing: Supports a longer context window.
- Deep reasoning: For complex tasks in math, logic, and code.
- Priority response: No queuing during peak hours.
- Higher daily usage limits.

**Premium (200 yuan/month)**

- All Pro features.
- Higher usage limits.
- Enterprise feature preview.
- Priority access to new features.

Additionally, there are Business and Enterprise versions for teams and enterprises, which are charged per user.

---

## Is the Free Version Still Good Enough?

To be honest: it depends on how you use it.

If you just use Doubao for chatting, checking the weather, writing social media captions, or translating a few sentences—the free version is perfectly sufficient. The basic Lark model handles these daily tasks without any problem.

But if your use cases fall into the following scenarios, the free version starts to fall short:

- Writing long texts, editing papers: The context window is insufficient, leading to frequent "memory lapses."
- Writing code, debugging: The gap in reasoning ability is noticeable.
- Complex analysis, multi-step reasoning: The free version will "talk nonsense with a straight face" (this is a direct quote from users).
- Using during peak hours: Queuing is the norm.

A metaphor from a Sogou WeChat search article is very apt: The difference between the free and paid versions is more like the difference between "standard mode" and "high-performance mode." It's not a question of whether you can use it, but whether it works well for you.

---

## Is It Worth 68 Yuan?

This question depends on what you used before.

**Upgrading from Free Doubao to Pro (68 yuan/month)**

If you are a heavy daily user of Doubao, the high-performance mode and longer context window you get for 68 yuan can indeed boost efficiency. But the question is—what else could you buy for the same price?

- **Kimi:** The free version already has a long context window; the paid version offers more comprehensive features.
- **DeepSeek:** An open-source model with extremely low API prices.
- **Tongyi Qianwen (Qwen):** From the Alibaba ecosystem, with a generous free tier.
- **ChatGPT Plus:** $20/month (approx. 145 yuan), with stronger GPT-4o capabilities.

68 yuan is not expensive among domestic AI services, but it's not cheap either. The key is whether Doubao's model capabilities justify this price.

**Competitor Price Comparison**

- Doubao Pro: 68 yuan/month
- Kimi Membership: Approx. 59 yuan/month
- Tongyi Qianwen Pro: Approx. 49 yuan/month
- ChatGPT Plus: $20/month (approx. 145 yuan)
- Claude Pro: $20/month (approx. 145 yuan)

Among domestic AI services, Doubao's pricing is on the higher end of the mid-range. However, Doubao's advantage lies in its ecosystem—Douyin, Toutiao, and Feishu are all integrating with it. If you are already a user within ByteDance's ecosystem, this price is more palatable.

---

## Industry Signals Behind Doubao's Charging

This isn't just about Doubao.

Via Sogou WeChat search, "The End of the Free AI Era" was one of the hottest topics in May 2026. Multiple articles pointed to the same trend: Free & Useful → Tiered Pricing → Sneaky Reductions & Shrinkage → Limits & Lockdown → Points & Harvesting.

Gemini's free tier is shrinking, Claude's free users are being rate-limited, and now Doubao has also started charging. The "subsidies for users" phase of the AI industry is basically over. What comes next is the "paying for quality" phase.

For average users, the good news is: basic features remain free and won't suddenly stop working. The bad news is: truly useful features are becoming increasingly expensive.

---

## Free Alternatives to Doubao

If you don't want to spend money, here are other options:

**Daily Chat and Writing**

- **DeepSeek:** Completely free, with a powerful open-source model.
- **Tongyi Qianwen (Qwen):** Basic version is free, part of the Alibaba ecosystem.
- **Kimi:** Free version with a long context window, ideal for reading and summarizing.

**Video Generation**

- **Kling AI:** 66 free credits daily.
- **Hailuo AI:** 300 credits upon registration.
- **Doubao's Seedance 2.0:** Currently still free.

**Coding Assistance**

- **Cursor:** Free version allows 50 completions per day.
- **Windsurf:** Free version has a basic quota.
- **Codeium:** Completely free code completion.

---

## How to Decide Whether to Pay

Ask yourself three questions:

1.  **Do you use Doubao for more than 30 minutes a day?** If yes, the efficiency boost from the Pro version might be worth it.
2.  **What do you use Doubao for?** If it's for chat and simple writing, the free version is enough. For heavy use in work or study, consider paying.
3.  **Do you have alternatives?** If DeepSeek or Kimi can meet your needs, there's no reason to pay for Doubao.

My advice: Start with the free version. Only consider paying when you truly feel it's "not enough." Don't impulsively subscribe just because "it might get more expensive later"—the price war for AI tools has only just begun, and the future will bring either cheaper prices or more choices.

---

## Frequently Asked Questions

**Q: Will the Doubao free version be cut?**

A: Not for now. ByteDance's strategy is "basic free + premium paid," not "charge for everything." The user base of 345 million MAUs is Doubao's greatest asset and won't be given up easily.

**Q: Is Seedance 2.0 video generation still free?**

A: As of May 2026, Doubao's official homepage still promotes "Log in to use Seedance 2.0 for free." However, the duration of this promotional window is uncertain. It's advisable to use it as much as possible while you can.

**Q: Which is better, Doubao Pro or ChatGPT Plus?**

A: It depends on the scenario. For Chinese dialogue and writing, Doubao Pro has a better grasp of the Chinese context. For English, code, and complex reasoning, ChatGPT Plus is stronger. In terms of price, Doubao Pro is less than half the cost.

**Q: Which version should an enterprise user choose?**

A: If your team uses Feishu (Lark), Doubao's Business/Enterprise version offers the highest integration. Otherwise, consider Tongyi Qianwen Enterprise or ChatGPT Team.

**Q: Will Doubao's quality improve after charging?**

A: This is what users care about most and also the biggest uncertainty. Multiple articles via Sogou WeChat search all ask the same question: "What if it's still 'clumsy' after I pay?" There isn't enough user feedback yet to make a judgment. It's recommended to wait a month or two to see actual reviews before deciding.

**Q: Will other domestic AI services start charging too?**

A: Highly likely. Kimi, Tongyi Qianwen, and Ernie Bot are all testing paid models. The window for free AI is shrinking—take advantage of it while you can.

title_zh: Gemini免费版缩水了：2026年谷歌AI还值得白嫖吗？
title_en: Gemini Free Tier Reduction: Is Google AI Still Worth Using for Free in 2026?
description_zh: Gemini免费版引入百分比周限额，高峰期可用次数大幅减少。详解免费版现状、付费方案对比、免费替代方案。
description_en: Gemini Free introduces a percentage-based weekly limit, significantly reducing available usage during peak hours. Detailed analysis of the free version's current status, paid plan comparisons, and fre

faq_zh.q: Gemini免费版完全不能用了吗？
faq_zh.a: 不是。基础功能还在，日常聊天、简单问答、翻译都没问题。只是复杂任务和高峰期体验变差了。

faq_zh.q: Google AI Studio的免费API和Gemini App免费版有什么区别？
faq_zh.a: AI Studio是给开发者的API接口，每天约1000次免费调用。Gemini App是面向普通用户的聊天界面。两个独立，AI Studio不受App限流影响。

faq_zh.q: Gemini免费版和DeepSeek免费版哪个好？
faq_zh.a: 搜索类问题选Gemini（有Google搜索加持）。中文对话和写作选DeepSeek。代码和推理两者差不多，但DeepSeek完全不限次数。
Gemini 2.5 Pro访问、Veo视频生成、2TB存储、Flow视频创作、Whisk图片转视频、NotebookLM增强、Gmail/Docs集成。

faq_zh.q: 有没有办法绕过Gemini免费版的限制？

faq_zh.q: 其他AI工具也会像Gemini一样缩水吗？
faq_zh.a: 已经在发生了。豆包开始收费，Claude免费用户被限流。AI行业补贴期结束是大趋势。

faq_en.q: Is Gemini free tier completely unusable now?
faq_en.a: No. Basic features still work - daily chat, simple Q&A, translation are fine. Complex tasks and peak-hour experience are just worse.

faq_en.q: What's the difference between Google AI Studio free API and Gemini App free tier?
faq_en.a: AI Studio is a developer API with ~1000 free calls/day. Gemini App is the consumer chat interface. They're independent - AI Studio isn't affected by App rate limits.

faq_en.q: Gemini free vs DeepSeek free - which is better?
faq_en.a: For search, choose Gemini (Google Search integration). For Chinese chat and writing, choose DeepSeek. For code and reasoning, they're similar but DeepSeek has no usage limits.

faq_en.q: Will other AI tools shrink their free tiers too?
faq_en.a: It's already happening. Doubao started charging, Claude limits free users. The AI subsidy era is ending industry-wide.

content_zh:
> 本文基于 Google 官方页面、搜狗微信公众号搜索（10+ 篇相关文章）、SammyGuru 报道整理。价格和限额数据截至 2026 年 5 月。

---

## 一句话总结

Gemini 免费版悄悄缩水了。2026 年 5 月 18 日，谷歌开始引入"百分比周限额"机制，高峰期可用次数大幅减少。免费用户还能用，但体验已经大不如前。与此同时，Google AI Pro（$19.99/月）和 Google AI Ultra（$249/月）两个付费档位正式确立。

---

## Gemini 免费版到底变了什么

搜狗微信搜索和 SammyGuru 的报道显示，2026 年 5 月中旬，谷歌对 Gemini 免费版做了几项关键调整：

**百分比周限额机制**

以前是固定的每日次数限制，现在改成按周计算的百分比限额。具体来说，谷歌不再告诉你"每天能用 X 次"，而是给你一个每周总配额，用完就等下周。

**高峰期限制加严**

太平洋时间的高峰时段（大约北京时间凌晨到中午），免费用户的可用次数被进一步压缩。搜狗微信搜索里的原话是："Google 的补贴大幅缩水，甚至将免费用户完全排除在 Gemini 3 Pro 的高峰期使用之外。"

**模型降级**

免费用户默认使用的是 Gemini Flash（轻量版），而不是 Gemini Pro。想用 Pro 模型？要么等非高峰时段碰运气，要么付费。

**历史回顾：两次腰斩**

根据搜狗微信搜索里的梳理，Gemini 免费版经历了两次明显缩水：
- 第一次（2025 年底）：悄悄降低了每日请求上限
- 第二次（2026 年 1 月）：再次降低，部分用户反映 Pro 模型请求限制降到每天约 50 次
- 第三次（2026 年 5 月）：引入百分比周限额，高峰期进一步限流

---

## Google 的付费方案长什么样

![Google Gemini AI助手首页 - 免费使用](/data/articles/gemini-homepage.webp))

从 Google One 官方页面提取的信息，目前分三档：

**Google One Basic（$1.99/月）**

- 100GB 存储
- 无 Gemini 高级功能
- 适合只需要存储空间的用户

**Google AI Pro（$19.99/月）**

- Gemini 2.5 Pro 访问
- Veo 视频生成
- 2TB 存储
- Flow 视频创作工具
- Whisk 图片转视频（更高限额）
- NotebookLM 增强功能
- Gmail、Docs、Vids 中的 Gemini 集成

**Google AI Ultra（$249/月）**

- Pro 版全部功能
- Gemini 3 Pro 最新模型
- 更高的使用量上限
- 优先体验新功能
- 面向专业用户和开发者

另外，Google AI Studio 的 API 免费层目前仍提供每天约 1000 次免费调用（Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite），但这个是给开发者的，普通用户用不上。

---

## 免费版现在还能干什么

别急着绝望。Gemini 免费版虽然缩水了，但基础功能还在：

**还能用的**

- 日常聊天和问答：Flash 模型处理简单任务没问题
- 基础图片理解：上传图片让它分析
- 基础翻译和写作：短文本没问题
- Google 搜索整合：这是 Gemini 的独特优势，其他 AI 做不到

**开始吃力的**

- 长文档分析：上下文窗口有限
- 复杂推理和代码：Flash 模型能力明显弱于 Pro
- 连续对话：用多了会触发限额
- 高峰期使用：排队是常态，可能直接被拒

**基本不能用的**

- Gemini 3 Pro：免费用户几乎排不上
- Veo 视频生成：付费专属
- Deep Research：付费专属

---

## 值不值得为 Gemini 付费

**$19.99/月的 AI Pro 值不值**

看你用什么。如果你主要用 Gemini 做以下事情，AI Pro 值得考虑：

- 在 Gmail、Docs 里用 AI 辅助写作：这是 Gemini 的独家优势
- 需要 Gemini 2.5 Pro 的推理能力：写代码、分析数据
- 用 Veo 生成视频：其他平台的视频生成工具更贵
- 需要 2TB Google 云存储：相当于 storage + AI 的组合包

但如果你只是聊天和写文章，$19.99/月太贵了。ChatGPT Plus 同样价格，能力更强。Claude Pro 也是 $20/月，长文本处理更好。

**$249/月的 AI Ultra 疯了吧**

这个价格面向的是专业开发者和重度用户。普通用户完全不需要考虑。如果你需要 Gemini 3 Pro 的最新能力，API 调用更划算。

---

## 免费 AI 替代方案

Gemini 免费版缩水后，这些替代方案值得关注：

**聊天和写作**

- DeepSeek：完全免费，开源，中文能力强
- 通义千问：基础版免费，阿里生态
- 豆包：基础版免费（但也在试探收费）
- Kimi：免费版长上下文，适合阅读和总结

**搜索增强**

- Perplexity：每天有免费 Pro 搜索额度，搜索质量不输 Gemini
- 秘塔 AI 搜索：中文搜索增强，免费使用

**编程辅助**

- Cursor：免费版每天 50 次补全
- Windsurf：免费版有基础额度
- Codeium：完全免费的代码补全

**API 调用**

- Google AI Studio：Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite 每天约 1000 次免费调用
- DeepSeek API：价格极低，约 $0.14/百万 token
- 通义千问 API：有免费额度

---

## Gemini 的独特优势：搜索整合

说实话，Gemini 免费版虽然缩水了，但有一个功能是其他 AI 替代不了的：Google 搜索整合。

当你问 Gemini 一个需要最新信息的问题时，它会自动调用 Google 搜索，给出带来源的回答。这个能力 DeepSeek 做不到，豆包做不到，Kimi 也做不好。

如果你主要拿 AI 来搜索和获取最新信息，Gemini 免费版依然是最好的选择——即使缩水了。但如果你需要深度推理和长文本处理，其他免费工具更划算。

---

## AI 免费时代的终局

Gemini 缩水 + 豆包收费 + Claude 限流 = AI 免费补贴时代结束了。

搜狗微信搜索里有篇文章标题很直白："免费好用 → 分级收费 → 暗改缩水 → 限额锁死 → 积分收割"。这就是 AI 行业正在走的路。

对普通用户的建议：

1. 趁现在还能白嫖，多用免费工具。窗口期在缩短。
2. 不要只依赖一个 AI 工具。多备几个，一个限流了换另一个。
3. 重度用户考虑付费。如果你的工作真的依赖 AI，$10-20/月的投入是值得的。
4. 关注开源模型。DeepSeek、Qwen 等开源模型可以本地部署，不受任何平台限制。

---

## 常见问题

**Q：Gemini 免费版完全不能用了吗？**

A：不是。基础功能还在，日常聊天、简单问答、翻译都没问题。只是复杂任务和高峰期体验变差了。

**Q：Google AI Studio 的免费 API 和 Gemini App 免费版有什么区别？**

A：AI Studio 是给开发者的 API 接口，每天约 1000 次免费调用（Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite）。Gemini App 是面向普通用户的聊天界面。两个是独立的，AI Studio 的免费额度不受 App 限流影响。

**Q：Gemini 免费版和 DeepSeek 免费版哪个好？**

A：搜索类问题选 Gemini（有 Google 搜索加持）。中文对话和写作选 DeepSeek（中文能力更强）。代码和推理两者差不多，但 DeepSeek 完全不限次数。

**Q：$19.99/月的 AI Pro 包含什么？**

A：Gemini 2.5 Pro 访问、Veo 视频生成、2TB 存储、Flow 视频创作、Whisk 图片转视频、NotebookLM 增强、Gmail/Docs/Vids 中的 Gemini 集成。相当于存储+AI 的组合包。

**Q：有没有办法绕过 Gemini 免费版的限制？**

A：几个技巧：1) 避开太平洋时间高峰段（北京时间凌晨到中午）使用；2) 用 Google AI Studio 的免费 API 代替 App；3) 简单任务用 Flash 模型，把 Pro 模型留给复杂任务。

**Q：其他 AI 工具也会像 Gemini 一样缩水吗？**

A：已经在发生了。豆包开始收费，Claude 免费用户被限流，Perplexity 的免费 Pro 搜索也有每日上限。AI 行业的补贴期结束是大趋势，不是个例。
content_en:
> This article is compiled based on Google's official page, Sogou WeChat Official Account search (10+ related articles), and SammyGuru reports. Price and quota data are current as of May 2026.

---

## TL;DR

Gemini's free tier has been quietly downsized. On May 18, 2026, Google began introducing a "percentage weekly quota" mechanism, significantly reducing the number of uses available during peak hours. Free users can still access it, but the experience is far from what it used to be. At the same time, two paid tiers—Google AI Pro ($19.99/month) and Google AI Ultra ($249/month)—have been officially established.

---

## What Exactly Changed in Gemini's Free Tier

According to Sogou WeChat search and SammyGuru reports, in mid-May 2026, Google made several key adjustments to Gemini's free tier:

**Percentage Weekly Quota Mechanism**

Previously, there was a fixed daily usage limit. Now, it has been changed to a weekly percentage quota. Specifically, Google no longer tells you "you can use X times per day." Instead, you get a total weekly quota, which resets only when the week ends.

**Stricter Peak Hour Limits**

During peak hours in the Pacific Time zone (approximately from midnight to noon in Beijing time), the available usage for free users has been further restricted. The original wording from the Sogou WeChat search is: "Google's subsidies have shrunk drastically, even completely excluding free users from using Gemini 3 Pro during peak hours."

**Model Downgrade**

Free users now default to using Gemini Flash (the lightweight version), not Gemini Pro. Want to use the Pro model? You either have to hope to get lucky during off-peak hours, or pay.

**A History of Halving: Two Major Downsizes**

According to the Sogou WeChat search summary, Gemini's free tier has undergone two clear reductions:
- First (late 2025): Quietly lowered the daily request limit.
- Second (January 2026): Lowered again; some users reported the Pro model request limit dropped to about 50 per day.
- Third (May 2026): Introduced the percentage weekly quota, with further throttling during peak hours.

---

## What Do Google's Paid Plans Look Like?

![Google Gemini AI Assistant Homepage - Free to Use](/data/articles/gemini-homepage.webp))

Information extracted from the Google One official page shows there are currently three tiers:

**Google One Basic ($1.99/month)**

- 100GB storage
- No Gemini premium features
- Suitable for users who only need storage space

**Google AI Pro ($19.99/month)**

- Gemini 2.5 Pro access
- Veo video generation
- 2TB storage
- Flow video creation tools
- Whisk image-to-video (higher quota)
- NotebookLM enhanced features
- Gemini integration in Gmail, Docs, Vids

**Google AI Ultra ($249/month)**

- All features from the Pro tier
- Gemini 3 Pro latest model
- Higher usage limits
- Priority access to new features
- Aimed at professional users and developers

Additionally, the free tier of the Google AI Studio API currently still offers approximately 1,000 free daily calls (Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite), but this is for developers and not accessible to general users.

---

## What Can the Free Tier Still Do?

Don't despair yet. Although the free tier of Gemini has been reduced, its basic functionality remains:

**Still Usable**

- Daily chat and Q&A: The Flash model handles simple tasks fine.
- Basic image understanding: Upload images for it to analyze.
- Basic translation and writing: Short texts are no problem.
- Google Search integration: This is Gemini's unique advantage; other AIs can't replicate it.

**Starting to Struggle**

- Long document analysis: The context window is limited.
- Complex reasoning and code: The Flash model is significantly weaker than the Pro model.
- Continuous conversation: Triggering the quota limit with heavy use is common.
- Peak hour usage: Queuing is the norm, and you might be directly rejected.

**Essentially Unusable**

- Gemini 3 Pro: Free users almost never get a turn.
- Veo video generation: Exclusive to paid tiers.
- Deep Research: Exclusive to paid tiers.

---

## Is It Worth Paying for Gemini?

**Is the $19.99/month AI Pro Worth It?**

It depends on what you use it for. If you primarily use Gemini for the following, AI Pro is worth considering:

- Using AI-assisted writing in Gmail, Docs: This is Gemini's exclusive advantage.
- Needing the reasoning power of Gemini 2.5 Pro: For writing code, analyzing data.
- Generating videos with Veo: Video generation tools on other platforms are more expensive.
- Needing 2TB of Google Cloud storage: It's essentially a storage + AI bundle.

However, if you're just chatting and writing articles, $19.99/month is too expensive. ChatGPT Plus costs the same but is more capable. Claude Pro is also $20/month and handles long texts better.

**Is the $249/month AI Ultra Crazy?**

This price is aimed at professional developers and heavy users. Regular users don't need to consider it at all. If you need the latest capabilities of Gemini 3 Pro, API calls are more cost-effective.

---

## Free AI Alternatives

After the reduction of Gemini's free tier, these alternatives are worth paying attention to:

**Chat & Writing**

- DeepSeek: Completely free, open-source, strong in Chinese.
- Tongyi Qianwen: Basic version free, part of the Alibaba ecosystem.
- Doubao: Basic version free (but also experimenting with paid tiers).
- Kimi: Free version has a long context, suitable for reading and summarization.

**Search Enhancement**

- Perplexity: Offers free daily Pro search quotas; search quality rivals Gemini.
- Metaso AI Search: Enhanced Chinese search, free to use.

**Programming Assistance**

- Cursor: Free version offers 50 completions per day.
- Windsurf: Free version has basic quotas.
- Codeium: Completely free code completion.

**API Calls**

- Google AI Studio: Approximately 1,000 free daily calls for Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite.
- DeepSeek API: Extremely low price, approximately $0.14 per million tokens.
- Tongyi Qianwen API: Has free quotas.

---

## Gemini's Unique Advantage: Search Integration

To be honest, although Gemini's free tier has been reduced, it has one feature that other AIs cannot replace: Google Search integration.

When you ask Gemini a question requiring the latest information, it automatically invokes Google Search and provides answers with sources. This capability DeepSeek cannot match, Doubao cannot achieve, and Kimi also does not do well.

If you primarily use AI for searching and getting the latest information, Gemini's free tier remains the best choice—even after the reduction. However, if you need deep reasoning and long-text processing, other free tools are more cost-effective.

---

## The Endgame of the Free AI Era

Gemini downsizing + Doubao starting to charge + Claude throttling = The era of free AI subsidies is over.

An article title from the Sogou WeChat search puts it bluntly: "Free & Good → Tiered Charging → Covert Downsizing → Locked Quotas → Point Harvesting." This is the path the AI industry is currently walking.

**Advice for Regular Users:**

1. Use free tools while you still can. The window is shrinking.
2. Don't rely on just one AI tool. Have a few backups; switch to another if one is throttled.
3. Heavy users should consider paying. If your work truly relies on AI, an investment of $10-20/month is worthwhile.
4. Pay attention to open-source models. Open-source models like DeepSeek, Qwen, etc.

# 2026年免费AI视频生成工具横评：可灵、海螺、Runway、Pika、Sora谁最能白嫖

## AI快速摘要

本文回答以下问题：
1. 哪个AI视频工具免费额度最多？（答案：可灵66积分/天 + 海螺66-100积分/天）
2. 免费版能生成什么质量的视频？（答案：1080p，3-10秒）
3. 哪个工具的免费版最实用？（答案：日常用可灵，追求画质用Runway）
4. 免费额度用完了怎么办？（答案：每天重置，或多账号轮换）
5. 有没有完全免费的AI视频工具？（答案：海螺AI接近完全免费）

---

我花了两周时间把2026年主流的AI视频生成工具全部试了一遍——可灵、海螺AI、Runway、Pika、Sora。有的免费额度慷慨得像在做慈善，有的"免费"两个字写得像讽刺。

以下是纯实测数据的横评。

## 五个AI视频工具的免费额度对比

**可灵AI（快手）**
免费额度：每天66积分
视频时长：5秒/10秒
分辨率：最高1080p
水印：有可灵水印
重置规则：每天重置
付费版：9.9元/月起

**海螺AI（MiniMax）**
免费额度：每天66-100积分
视频时长：4秒/8秒
分辨率：最高1080p
水印：有海螺水印
重置规则：每天重置
付费版：基础免费，高级功能付费

**Runway**
免费额度：新注册125积分（一次性，不重置）
视频时长：4秒/10秒
分辨率：最高1080p
水印：有Runway水印
重置规则：不重置
付费版：$12/月起

**Pika**
免费额度：每天约10次生成
视频时长：3秒/4秒
分辨率：最高1080p
水印：有Pika水印
重置规则：每天重置
付费版：$8/月起

**Sora（OpenAI）**
免费额度：ChatGPT Plus用户可用（$20/月），免费用户无
视频时长：5秒/10秒/15秒/20秒
分辨率：最高1080p
水印：有Sora水印
重置规则：按积分
付费版：包含在ChatGPT Plus中

## 实测对比：五个工具的免费额度到底差多少

我用同一个提示词"一只金毛犬在海边奔跑，夕阳背景"在5个工具上各生成了3个视频，对比效果：

**额度最慷慨：可灵AI**
每天65积分，够生成3-5个短视频（5秒约10积分，10秒约20积分）。而且每天都重置，不存在"用完就没了"的问题。画质中上，偶尔有手部变形。

**画质最稳定：Runway**
虽然只有125积分（一次性），但每个视频的画质都明显高于其他工具。问题是额度用完就没了，只能付费。

**速度最快：海螺AI**
生成速度碾压其他工具，5秒视频通常10秒内出结果。画质中等，但胜在快。每天66-100积分，够用。

**最便宜的付费版：Pika**
$8/月就能解锁大量额度，适合需要频繁生成的用户。免费版每天10次也够轻度使用。

**最全能但最贵：Sora**
视频时长最长（20秒），画质最好，但必须是ChatGPT Plus用户（$20/月）才能用。没有独立的免费版。

## 我的失败教训：免费额度踩过的坑

**坑1：Runway的125积分一次就用完了**
我以为Runway的免费额度是每天125积分，结果是一次性的。第一天就生成了5个视频，积分直接归零。后来才知道要省着用。

**坑2：高峰期可灵排队严重**
工作日晚上8-11点是高峰期，可灵的生成排队可能要等10-15分钟。周末更夸张。建议错峰使用。

**坑3：免费版都有水印**
5个工具的免费版都有水印，只是位置和大小不同。如果需要商用或正式用途，必须付费去水印。

**坑4：视频时长受限**
免费版最多只能生成4-10秒的视频。想做30秒以上的完整视频？需要付费或多次拼接。

## 最佳使用策略：按场景选工具

**日常娱乐和社交媒体 → 可灵AI**
每天66积分够用，画质够发朋友圈和抖音。

**快速原型和创意测试 → 海螺AI**
速度最快，10秒出结果，适合快速验证创意。

**高质量短片 → Runway**
画质最好，适合做广告素材或短片开头。

**预算有限 → Pika**
$8/月的付费版是性价比最高的选择。

**专业制作 → Sora**
20秒最长时长，1080p画质，适合专业视频制作。

## 常见问题

**AI视频工具免费版能商用吗？**
大部分可以，但有水印和使用条款限制。可灵和海螺的免费版允许非商业用途商用，Runway和Pika需要付费版才能商用。

**免费版生成的视频有水印吗？**
有。5个工具的免费版都有水印。可灵的水印在右下角，海螺的在左下角，Runway和Pika的在右下角。

**哪个AI视频工具画质最好？**
Runway和Sora画质最好，其次是可灵。海螺和Pika画质中等但速度更快。

**免费额度每天重置吗？**
可灵、海螺、Pika每天重置。Runway是一次性125积分不重置。Sora按ChatGPT Plus的积分。

**怎么去除免费版的水印？**
付费。目前没有免费去水印的方法。可灵9.9元/月就能去水印，是最低成本的选择。

**AI视频工具能做长视频吗？**
免费版最多10秒。做长视频需要多次生成后拼接，或者用付费版解锁更长时长。Sora付费版最长支持20秒。
content_en:
This article is compiled based on official tool websites, Sogou WeChat Official Account search (15 related articles), and third-party evaluation data. Data is current as of May 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

In 2026, free AI video generation tools are becoming absurdly competitive. Kling AI offers 66 credits daily, Hailuo AI 100 credits daily, and Runway 125 credits monthly — free users can produce videos every day. However, each tool varies significantly in image quality, duration, and watermark policies; choosing wrong means wasted effort.

---

## How Free Credits Actually Compare — A 6-Tool Review

![Hailuo AI Free Video Generation - No Payment Required](/data/articles/hailuo-homepage.webp))

First, let’s break down the numbers:

**Kling AI (Kuaishou):** 66 credits daily, reset daily. Each video costs 10–20 credits, allowing 3–6 generations per day. Resolution: 720p–1080p, duration: 5–10 seconds. Includes a watermark.

**Hailuo AI (MiniMax):** 66–100 credits daily, reset daily. New users receive an extra 300 credits upon registration. Features the most natural motion effects, 5–6 seconds. Some videos may be watermark-free, depending on luck.

**Runway Gen-3:** 125 credits monthly. Once credits are used up, you must wait for next month. Top-tier image quality, but free credits deplete quickly.

**Pika:** Daily reset quota, with specific amounts depending on usage. Excels in creative special effects and fun style transformations. Suitable for social media material.

**Sora (OpenAI):** Bundled with ChatGPT Plus. The free version allows only very limited generations daily; Plus users get more credits but may face queuing.

**Luma Dream Machine:** 30 free generations per month. Realistic physics effects, 5-second duration. Enough for trying out, not for heavy use.

---

## Image Quality Test — Which Tool Performs Best Visually?

![2026 AI Video Generation Quality Ranking](/data/articles/video-quality-ranking.webp))

Scores are based on three dimensions: motion coherence, image clarity, and character consistency (on a 5-point scale):

**Kling AI:** Motion Coherence 4.5 / Clarity 4.5 / Character Consistency 4.0. Overall strongest, especially in image-to-video mode, which outperforms text prompts by a wide margin.

**Hailuo AI:** Motion Coherence 4.5 / Clarity 4.0 / Character Consistency 4.5. Most natural character actions; scenes like walking or turning heads are nearly indistinguishable from real footage.

**Runway:** Motion Coherence 4.0 / Clarity 4.5 / Character Consistency 4.0. Detailed image quality, though occasional motion stuttering occurs.

**Pika:** Motion Coherence 3.5 / Clarity 4.0 / Character Consistency 3.5. Strong in creative effects, but base image quality lags behind the top three.

**Sora:** Motion Coherence 4.5 / Clarity 4.5 / Character Consistency 4.0. Top-tier quality, but limited free credits make it less cost-effective.

**Luma:** Motion Coherence 4.0 / Clarity 4.0 / Character Consistency 3.5. Good physics effects, but occasional character distortion.

---

## Recommendations for Different Needs

**For short video material:** Kling AI or Hailuo AI. Both offer daily free credits, with 5–10 second durations suitable for Douyin/Kuaishou content. Kling AI has better image quality; Hailuo AI offers more natural motion.

**For social media posts:** Pika. Rich in creative effects and fun style transformations, ideal for eye-catching short content.

**For trying out AI video:** Sora or Runway. Best image quality but limited free credits. Suitable for those curious about the current capabilities of AI video.

**For professional projects:** Runway’s paid version. Gen-3 Alpha’s image quality is the most reliable in professional scenarios.

**For domestic (Chinese) users:** Kling AI or Hailuo AI. No VPN needed, fast speed, and accurate understanding of Chinese prompts.

---

## Pitfall Avoidance Guide — Hidden Limitations of Free Versions

**Watermark issues:** The free version of Kling AI includes a watermark; removing it requires payment. Some Hailuo AI videos may be watermark-free, but this is not guaranteed. Luma includes a watermark.

**Duration limits:** Free versions are generally capped at 5–10 seconds. For videos longer than 30 seconds, all tools require payment.

**Resolution:** Free versions max out at 1080p, with some limited to 720p. 4K output requires payment across all tools.

**Commercial use restrictions:** Videos generated on free versions are generally not licensed for commercial use. Commercial usage requires a paid subscription.

**Queuing:** Sora and Runway may have queues during peak times, with free users given the lowest priority.

---

## Cost-Effectiveness Ranking

If ranking the free versions:

**Tier 1:** Kling AI (66 credits daily, good image quality) and Hailuo AI (100 credits daily, natural motion). These are the most user-friendly for free users.

**Tier 2:** Pika (strong creativity) and Luma (good physics effects). Sufficient credits for daily casual use.

**Tier 3:** Runway (good quality but limited credits) and Sora (top-tier but very limited free access). Suitable for occasional tryouts.

title_zh: Kimi K2.6 免费编码指南：开源最强编码Agent，300个子智能体并行干活
title_en: Kimi K2.6 Free Coding Guide: Best Open-Source Coding Agent with 300 Parallel Sub-Agents
description_zh: Kimi K2.6 SWE-Bench Pro 58.6分，开源第一。13小时不间断编码，Agent Swarm 300子智能体并行。免费版每天有额度。
description_en: Kimi K2.6 scores 58.6 on SWE-Bench Pro, #1 among open-source models. 13-hour non-stop coding, Agent Swarm with 300 parallel sub-agents. Free tier with daily credits.

faq_zh.q: Kimi K2.6 免费版能用来写代码吗？
faq_zh.a: 可以。免费版每天有额度，日常编码任务（写函数、改bug、解释代码）够用。但连续重度编码会很快用完额度。

faq_zh.q: Kimi K2.6 和 Claude 哪个编码更强？
faq_zh.a: K2.6 在 SWE-Bench Pro 得分 58.6，接近 Claude Sonnet 水平。但 Claude 在复杂推理和长上下文处理上仍有优势。免费用户建议两个都用。

faq_zh.q: Agent Swarm 是什么？怎么用？
faq_zh.a: Agent Swarm 是 K2.6 的多智能体协同功能，一个主 Agent 可以同时调度 300 个子 Agent 并行工作。适合批量处理任务和大型项目重构。免费用户额度有限，慎用。

faq_zh.q: Kimi K2.6 能免费用多久？
faq_zh.a: Kimi 免费版是长期提供的，不是限时活动。但每天的免费额度有限，具体数量官方没有公布固定数字。

faq_zh.q: Kimi K2.6 开源吗？能私有化部署吗？
faq_zh.a: K2.6 是开源权重模型，可以通过 OpenRouter 或月之暗面 API 调用。私有化部署需要自备算力。K2-0905 是更早的开源版本。

faq_zh.q: Kimi 免费版和 Cursor 免费版哪个好？
faq_zh.a: 定位不同。Kimi 是独立对话+Agent 平台，编码能力强但不是 IDE 集成。Cursor 是 IDE 内的编程助手，开发体验更流畅。建议编码用 Cursor，复杂任务用 Kimi。

faq_en.q: Can I use Kimi K2.6 free tier for coding?
faq_en.a: Yes. The free tier includes daily credits, enough for routine coding tasks like writing functions, fixing bugs, and explaining code. Heavy continuous coding will exhaust credits quickly.

faq_en.q: Is Kimi K2.6 better than Claude for coding?
faq_en.a: K2.6 scores 58.6 on SWE-Bench Pro, near Claude Sonnet level. Claude still has an edge in complex reasoning and long-context tasks. Free users should use both.

faq_en.q: What is Agent Swarm and how do I use it?
faq_en.a: Agent Swarm is K2.6's multi-agent coordination feature — one main agent can orchestrate 300 sub-agents in parallel. Great for batch tasks and large refactors. Free tier has limited capacity for this feature.

faq_en.q: How long can I use Kimi K2.6 for free?
faq_en.a: Kimi's free tier is ongoing, not a limited-time promotion. However, daily free credits are limited and the exact amount isn't officially fixed.

faq_en.q: Is Kimi K2.6 open source?
faq_en.a: K2.6 uses open-weight models, accessible via OpenRouter or Moonshot AI's API. Self-hosting requires your own compute. K2-0905 is an earlier open-source release.

faq_en.q: Kimi free vs Cursor free — which is better?
faq_en.a: Different tools. Kimi is a standalone chat + agent platform with strong coding ability. Cursor is an IDE-integrated coding assistant with smoother dev workflow. Use Cursor for coding sessions, Kimi for complex multi-step tasks.

content_zh:
> 本文基于 Kimi 官方页面、OpenRouter 平台数据、Sogou 微信公众号搜索（12 篇相关文章）、SWE-Bench 基准测试数据整理。数据截至 2026 年 5 月。

---

## 一句话总结

Kimi K2.6 在 SWE-Bench Pro 拿了 58.6 分，开源模型第一。能 13 小时不间断编码、300 个子 Agent 并行作业。免费版每天有额度，日常对话和轻量编码够用。想白嫖顶级编码能力，这是目前性价比最高的选择之一。

---

## K2.6 到底强在哪

![Kimi K2.6 编码能力基准测试成绩](/data/articles/kimi-k26-benchmark.webp)

SWE-Bench Pro 得分 58.6——开源权重模型里的最高分。这个基准测的是真实软件工程任务：读代码、改 bug、写功能、跑测试。不是写个 hello world 就能拿分的。

Finance Agent Benchmark V2 开源榜第一。金融场景的 Agent 能力，K2.6 比很多闭源模型都强。

前端编码任务杀进开放权重总榜第三，性能接近 Claude Sonnet。对于免费用户来说，这意味着你可以用免费额度做接近商业级的编码工作。

---

## Agent Swarm——300 个 AI 同时干活

K2.6 最炸裂的功能是 Agent Swarm。简单说就是：一个主 Agent 可以同时调度 300 个子 Agent 并行工作。

实际场景：你要重构一个大项目。以前一个 AI 要一个文件一个文件改，现在 300 个 Agent 同时开工，速度提升不是一点半点。

官方数据：13 小时不间断编码。这在开源模型里是前所未有的稳定性。之前用开源模型做长任务，跑到一半崩了是常态。

---

## 免费版到底能干什么

![Kimi AI免费层界面 - 无限次日常使用](/data/articles/kimi-free-tier.webp))

Kimi 免费版每天有额度，具体数量官方没公布固定数字，但根据社区反馈：

日常对话：完全够用。每天聊个几十轮没问题。

轻量编码：写个函数、改个 bug、解释代码，够用。

重度编码：连续写几百行代码或跑 Agent Swarm，免费额度很快用完。

Deep Research：深度研究模式会消耗更多额度，省着用。

Kimi Code（编程助手）和 Kimi Claw（智能体）在免费版里也能用，但有频率限制。

---

## 和其他免费编程工具比

Claude 免费版：每天消息条数有限，代码能力强但额度紧。Kimi 免费额度相对更宽裕。

ChatGPT 免费版：GPT-4o mini 日常够用，但编码能力不如 K2.6。

Cursor 免费版：2 周 Pro 试用 + 每月 2000 次补全。和 Kimi 定位不同，Cursor 是 IDE 集成，Kimi 是独立 Agent。

Copilot 免费版：每月 2000 次补全 + 50 次高级模型。额度比 Kimi 多，但模型能力不如 K2.6。

综合来看，Kimi K2.6 免费版在编码能力上可能是目前免费工具里最强的，但额度比专门的编程工具少。

---

## 怎么开始用

第一步：打开 kimi.moonshot.cn，注册账号（手机号就行）。

第二步：直接在对话框里提问。编码任务建议用中文描述清楚需求，K2.6 对中文提示词理解很好。

第三步：如果要做编程任务，切换到 Kimi Code 模式。支持代码高亮和一键复制。

第四步：想用 Agent Swarm 功能，需要在设置里开启。这个功能比较吃额度，免费用户慎用。

进阶用法：通过 OpenRouter API 调用 K2.6 模型，可以集成到自己的开发流程里。OpenRouter 上 K2.6 目前有免费体验额度。

---

## K2.6 vs K2.5 vs K2——该用哪个

K2.6：最新最强，编码和 Agent 能力全面升级。推荐优先使用。

K2.5：稳定性好，适合长时间运行的编码任务。如果 K2.6 额度用完了，退回 K2.5。

K2（K2-0905）：开源版本，适合私有化部署。需要自己搭服务器。

Moonshot V1：经典对话模型，适合非编码场景的日常聊天。

---
content_en:
> This article is compiled based on the Kimi official page, OpenRouter platform data, Sogou WeChat Official Account search (12 related articles), and SWE-Bench benchmark test data. Data is current as of May 2026.

---

## One-Sentence Summary

Kimi K2.6 scored 58.6 on SWE-Bench Pro, ranking first among open-source models. It can code continuously for 13 hours and handle 300 sub-Agents working in parallel. The free tier offers a daily quota, sufficient for daily conversations and lightweight coding. If you want to leverage top-tier coding capabilities for free, this is currently one of the most cost-effective choices.

---

## Where Exactly K2.6 Excels

![Kimi K2.6 Coding Capability Benchmark Scores](/data/articles/kimi-k26-benchmark.webp)

It scored 58.6 on SWE-Bench Pro—the highest among open-weight models. This benchmark tests real-world software engineering tasks: reading code, fixing bugs, writing features, and running tests. It's not about writing a hello world to score points.

It ranks first in the open-source list for the Finance Agent Benchmark V2. For agent capabilities in financial scenarios, K2.6 outperforms many closed-source models.

For frontend coding tasks, it has broken into the top three in the open-weight overall list, with performance approaching Claude Sonnet. For free users, this means you can do near-commercial-grade coding work using the free quota.

---

## Agent Swarm—300 AIs Working Simultaneously

K2.6's most explosive feature is Agent Swarm. Simply put: one main Agent can simultaneously orchestrate 300 sub-Agents working in parallel.

Real-world scenario: You need to refactor a large project. Previously, one AI would have to modify files one by one. Now, 300 Agents can start working at the same time—the speed increase is not just a little bit.

Official data: 13 hours of uninterrupted coding. This level of stability is unprecedented in open-source models. Previously, using open-source models for long tasks often ended with crashes midway.

---

## What Can the Free Tier Actually Do

![Kimi AI Free Tier - Unlimited Daily Usage](/data/articles/kimi-free-tier.webp))

The Kimi free tier offers a daily quota. The official hasn't released a fixed number, but based on community feedback:

*   **Daily Conversation:** Completely sufficient. Dozens of turns per day is no problem.
*   **Lightweight Coding:** Writing a function, fixing a bug, explaining code—sufficient.
*   **Heavy Coding:** Writing hundreds of lines of code consecutively or running Agent Swarm will deplete the free quota quickly.
*   **Deep Research:** The deep research mode consumes more quota, so use it sparingly.

Kimi Code (Programming Assistant) and Kimi Claw (Agent) are also available in the free version, but with rate limits.

---

## Compared to Other Free Programming Tools

*   **Claude Free Tier:** Limited daily message count. Strong coding ability but tight quota. Kimi's free quota is relatively more generous.
*   **ChatGPT Free Tier:** GPT-4o mini is sufficient for daily use, but its coding ability is not as good as K2.6.
*   **Cursor Free Tier:** 2-week Pro trial + 2,000 completions per month. Positioned differently from Kimi; Cursor is an IDE integration, while Kimi is a standalone Agent.
*   **Copilot Free Tier:** 2,000 completions per month + 50 advanced model uses. The quota is larger than Kimi's, but the model capability is not as good as K2.6.

Overall, Kimi K2.6's free tier might currently be the strongest among free tools in terms of coding ability, but its quota is smaller than that of dedicated programming tools.

---

## How to Get Started

1.  **Step 1:** Go to kimi.moonshot.cn and register an account (phone number is sufficient).
2.  **Step 2:** Ask questions directly in the dialogue box. For coding tasks, it's recommended to describe the requirements clearly in Chinese—K2.6 understands Chinese prompts very well.
3.  **Step 3:** For programming tasks, switch to Kimi Code mode. It supports syntax highlighting and one-click copying.
4.  **Step 4:** To use the Agent Swarm feature, you need to enable it in settings. This feature is quota-intensive; free users should use it cautiously.

**Advanced Usage:** Call the K2.6 model via the OpenRouter API to integrate it into your own development workflow. OpenRouter currently offers a free trial quota for K2.6.

---

## K2.6 vs K2.5 vs K2—Which One Should You Use

*   **K2.6:** Latest and strongest, with comprehensive upgrades to coding and Agent capabilities. Recommended for priority use.
*   **K2.5:** Good stability, suitable for long-running coding tasks. If the K2.6 quota is used up, fall back to K2.5.
*   **K2 (K2-0905):** Open-source version, suitable for private deployment. Requires setting up your own server.
*   **Moonshot V1:** Classic dialogue model, suitable for daily chats in non-coding scenarios.

content_zh:
# 2026免费AI API额度大全：国内外12个平台白嫖指南

Token就像开了闸的自来水，哗哗地流。跑Agent、处理长文档、接自动化工作流，上个月光API调用就烧了百来块。

为了治好这个"Token焦虑症"，我把国内外能找到的免费API渠道翻了个底朝天。这篇文章把12个平台的免费额度、获取方式、使用限制全部整理清楚，照着做就行。

![2026年免费AI API Token获取指南](/data/articles/free-ai-api-tokens-2026.webp))

## 国内免费API额度

### 月之暗面（Kimi）

长文档的克星。Kimi的核心杀手锏是超长上下文窗口，啃几十页研报、法律合同用它贼爽。

注册后完成个人/企业认证，15元额度到账，有效期约3个月。点击左侧"API Key管理"新建一个就行。

适合场景：长文档分析、研报摘要、合同审查

### 智谱AI

BigModel真把白嫖党当自己人。注册就送2000万Token，包含600万GLM-4.6v、1200万GLM-4.5-air，还有200万通用Token，有效期3个月。

右上角点"财务"→"资源包"就能看到余额。返回首页点"API key"，系统会自动建好一个key。

2000万Token什么概念？普通对话一次大概消耗1000-3000 Token，够你聊几万次。

### 腾讯云

完成实名验证，送100万Token混元大模型资源包+100万Token embedding模型资源包，有效期一年。

搜索栏搜"腾讯混元API"，进入后点"立即开通"。左侧"资源管理"能看到两个资源包。

所有平台里白嫖时间给最久的一个，适合慢慢用的小项目，不用担心突然过期。

### 讯飞星火

综合能力全面的老牌选手，数理逻辑和通用问答很强。

注册后在首页点"星火大模型"，弹出领取500万Token的弹框。支持调用Spark X2、Qwen3、DeepSeek V3等模型。

注意：赠送的Token没说用多久，最好开箱即食，以防不测。

### 阿里云百炼

模型界的超级市场。货架上摆满各种模型（千问、DeepSeek、GLM等），跟模型商场一样。

注册+实名后，进百炼控制台点"API Key"页面创建key。左侧栏"模型用量"能看到额度。

关键信息：每个模型单独送100万Token，开启使用后有效期90天。模型包括：

- 推理模型：GLM-5、DeepSeek-V3.2
- 视频模型：wanx-v1
- 全模态模型：Qwen3.5-Omni-Plus
- 语音模型：Qwen3-TTS-vd
- 向量模型：gte-rerank-v2

一个账号能领几十个模型的额度，加起来非常可观。做图片识别、图表分析这种多模态任务，这里是首选。

### 硅基流动

聪明的中间商，一个Key就能调DeepSeek、GLM、Qwen好几家的模型。注册实名送14元代金券，有效期半年。

怕麻烦的直接在这调，一个入口白嫖多家模型。

### MiniMax（稀宇科技）

语音和文本的多面手，新人可领15元代金券，有效期2个月。适合做横向对比或作为备用入口。

### AI Ping

小而美的体验包。注册送1块钱，实名认证再送5块钱。适合轻量试用MiniMax-M2.7、GLM-5-Turbo等主流模型。

## 国外免费API额度

### GitHub Models

用GitHub账号自带的Token就能免费用GPT-5这种顶级模型。无需绑卡，选择GPT-5、DeepSeek V3、Llama 4等模型直接用。

门槛压到了地板，剩下的全靠你自己。

### OpenRouter

一把钥匙开全网。注册后在搜索栏搜"free"，能找到28个免费模型。和硅基流动类似，一个API Key调用全网主流大模型。

### Sambanova

开局就送5刀（约20多块钱），Google账号登录后在Dashboard能看到适配的模型非常多。左侧栏点"API Key"创建即可。

### ZenMux

企业级的免费尝鲜平台，带保险赔付机制。提供一站式访问OpenAI、Anthropic、Google、DeepSeek等主流模型的统一接口。首页就能免费使用Imagen 2模型，Agens 1.5 Pro也可以免费用。

## 使用技巧

**一定要开"用完即停"开关！** 免费额度用完后，很多平台默认从绑的卡里扣钱。别问我怎么知道的，问就是心痛。

**先吃快过期的粮。** 智谱3个月、阿里90天这种短期额度赶紧用；腾讯混元那种1年的留着细水长流。

**想用DeepSeek别死磕官网。** 官网服务器经常"繁忙"，去阿里云百炼或者硅基流动搞个Key调DeepSeek，体验丝滑一百倍，效果一样。

**免费额度都有速率限制。** 一分钟只能请求几次，做对外服务、对公的、做demo可以，其他的趁早付费，免费版扛不住。

## 该选哪个平台？

**新手入门：** 智谱AI（2000万Token最多）+ GitHub Models（能用GPT-5）

**长文档处理：** 月之暗面Kimi（超长上下文窗口）

**多模型对比：** 阿里云百炼（模型最全）或 硅基流动（一个Key调多家）

**长期慢慢用：** 腾讯云（有效期1年）

**海外模型：** OpenRouter（28个免费模型）或 Sambanova（送5刀）

免费API就像是新手村的礼包，能让你快速体验AI的威力。但真正让你在这个领域站稳的，是试着挑一个你最头疼的任务，找一个对应的模型，把Key接入你顺手的工具里。当你第一次通过API自动完成一项过去要干半小时的活时，你会发现那种爽感，值了。
content_en:
# Free AI API Tokens 2026: 12 Platforms That Give You Free Credits

Looking for free AI API credits? I tested 12 platforms and compiled every free tier, signup bonus, and hidden limit. Whether you need tokens for coding, long documents, or experimental projects, this guide shows you exactly where to get them — and how long they last.

Last month, my API bill hit 100 yuan. Tokens were draining like an open faucet — running Agents, processing documents, building automations. So I went on a scavenger hunt for every free API渠道 I could find. Here's the full breakdown.

## Best Free AI API Platforms in China

### Moonshot Kimi — Best for Long Documents

Kimi's standout feature is its massive context window. Feed it a 50-page research report or a legal contract, and it handles it effortlessly.

**How to get credits:** Register at platform.moonshot.cn, complete personal or enterprise verification. You'll receive 15 yuan in credits, valid for approximately 3 months.

**Best for:** Research summaries, legal document review, long-form analysis

### Zhipu AI (BigModel) — Most Generous Signup Bonus

Zhipu gives away an absurd amount of free tokens. Register and immediately receive 20 million tokens — split across GLM-4.6v (6M), GLM-4.5-air (12M), and general-purpose tokens (2M). Valid for 3 months.

**How to get credits:** Sign up at bigmodel.cn. Click "Finance" then "Resource Pack" in the top right to view your balance. API keys are auto-created on the homepage.

**Math:** At 1,000-3,000 tokens per conversation, 20 million tokens equals tens of thousands of chats.

### Tencent Cloud — Longest Expiry Period

Complete real-name verification and receive 1 million tokens for the Hunyuan large model plus 1 million tokens for the embedding model. **Valid for one year** — the longest expiry of any platform.

**How to get credits:** Search "Tencent Hunyuan API" on cloud.tencent.com, click "Activate Now." Find your resources under "Resource Management" on the left sidebar.

**Best for:** Slow-and-steady projects where you don't want credits expiring on you.

### iFlytek Spark — Quick and Easy

A well-established AI platform with strong math and general Q&A capabilities. Register, click "Spark Model" on the homepage, and claim 5 million tokens. Supports Spark X2, Qwen3, DeepSeek V3, and more.

**Note:** No明确 expiry period announced — use these credits promptly.

### Alibaba Cloud Bailian — Most Models Per Account

Think of Bailian as a model supermarket. Register + real-name verification, create an API key, and check "Model Usage" for your credits.

**Key detail:** Each model gets 1 million tokens separately, valid for 90 days once activated. Models include GLM-5, DeepSeek-V3.2, wanx-v1, Qwen3.5-Omni-Plus, Qwen3-TTS-vd, and gte-rerank-v2.

One account can accumulate dozens of models' worth of credits — the most generous multi-model offering available.

### SiliconFlow — One Key, Many Models

A smart aggregator that lets you call DeepSeek, GLM, Qwen, and others with a single API key. Register with real-name verification and receive a 14 yuan voucher, valid for 6 months.

Perfect for developers who want to test multiple models without managing separate accounts.

### MiniMax — Voice and Text Versatile

Strong in voice synthesis and text generation with multimodal capabilities. New users receive a 15 yuan voucher, valid for 2 months. Useful for comparison testing or as a backup endpoint.

### AI Ping — Lightweight Trial

Register for 1 yuan, complete real-name verification for another 5 yuan. Supports MiniMax-M2.7, GLM-5-Turbo and other mainstream models. Best for quick, lightweight experiments.

## Best Free AI API Platforms Internationally

### GitHub Models — No Credit Card Required

Use your GitHub account to access GPT-5 for free. No payment information needed. Choose from GPT-5, DeepSeek V3, Llama 4 and more.

**Limitations:** 15 requests per minute, 150 requests per day.

**Why it matters:** This is the lowest-barrier way to access GPT-5-class models for free.

### OpenRouter — 28 Free Models

Register at openrouter.ai and search "free" — you'll find 28 complimentary models. One API key accesses the entire catalog.

**Limitations:** 50 requests/day without充值. Top up $10 for 1,000 requests/day (valid for one year).

### Sambanova — $5 Free Credits

Register with a Google account and receive $5 in credits — roughly 20+ yuan. Browse compatible models in the Dashboard and create API keys from the left sidebar.

### ZenMux — Enterprise-Grade Free Tier

A unified API platform with insurance-backed guarantees. Access OpenAI, Anthropic, Google, and DeepSeek models through a single endpoint. Imagen 2 and Agens 1.5 Pro are available for free.

## Critical Tips: Don't Skip These

**Enable "stop when depleted" immediately.** Many platforms default to charging your card after free credits expire. Learn from my mistake.

**Use expiring credits first.** Zhipu's 3-month and Alibaba's 90-day credits should be consumed quickly. Save Tencent's 1-year credits for later.

**Avoid hammering DeepSeek's official site.** Their servers are frequently "busy." Get a key from Alibaba Bailian or SiliconFlow for a much smoother experience.

**All free APIs have rate limits.** Expect 1-50 requests per minute depending on the platform. Fine for testing and learning; production workloads require paid plans.

## Platform Comparison: Quick Reference

**Most tokens:** Zhipu AI (20 million)

**Longest validity:** Tencent Cloud (1 year)

**Most models:** Alibaba Bailian (dozens of models, 1M each)

**Easiest access:** GitHub Models (no credit card, 15 RPM)

**Best for coding:** SiliconFlow (DeepSeek R1, Qwen3-8B)

**Best for long docs:** Moonshot Kimi (ultra-long context)

**Best international:** OpenRouter (28 free models, global access)

## When to Upgrade to Paid

Free tiers are perfect for:
- Learning and experimentation
- Personal projects and prototypes
- Small-scale automation scripts
- Testing model capabilities before committing

Upgrade when you need:
- Production-grade reliability
- Higher rate limits
- Longer context windows
- Dedicated support

Free API credits are the tutorial gift box — they let you experience AI's power at zero cost. But what really anchors you in this field is picking your most annoying task, finding the right model, and plugging the key into your workflow. The first time you automate something that used to take 30 minutes, you'll know it was worth it.

title_zh: 2026免费AI API终极指南：23个平台实测，附速率限制和避坑点
